33012.title: APT or “AIPT”? The Surprising Dominance of Large Factor Models
33012.zh_title: APT还是“AIPT”？大型因子模型的惊人主导地位
33012.authors: Antoine Didisheim, Shikun (Barry) Ke, Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud
33012.abstract: We introduce artificial intelligence pricing theory (AIPT). In contrast with the APT’s foundational assumption of a low dimensional factor structure in returns, the AIPT conjectures that returns are driven by a large number of factors. We first verify this conjecture empirically and show that complex nonlinear models with an exorbitant number of factors (many more than the number of training observations or base assets) are far more successful in describing the out-of-sample behavior of asset returns than simpler benchmark models. Economically, we show that complex models are more than twice as sensitive to long-run macroeconomic activity than simpler benchmarks. Finally, we theoretically characterize the behavior of large factor pricing models, from which we show that the AIPT’s “many factors” conjecture faithfully explains our empirical findings, while the APT’s “few factors” conjecture is contradicted by the data.
33012.zh_abstract: 我们提出了人工智能定价理论（AIPT）。与APT关于收益率存在低维因子结构的基础假设相反，AIPT推测收益率是由大量因子驱动的。我们首先通过实证验证了这一推测，并表明，与更简单的基准模型相比，使用数量惊人的因子（远多于训练观测值或基础资产数量）的复杂非线性模型在描述资产收益率的样本外行为方面要成功得多。从经济角度看，我们表明，复杂模型对长期宏观经济活动的敏感性是更简单基准模型的两倍以上。最后，我们从理论上刻画了大型因子定价模型的行为，并由此表明，AIPT的“多因子”推测忠实地解释了我们的实证发现，而APT的“少因子”推测则与数据相矛盾。
33012.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C1, C40, C45, C55, G1, G11, G12, G14, G17

33011.title: Fear and Dreams: Understanding the Non-Institutional sources of Leader Strategy
33011.zh_title: 恐惧与梦想：理解领导人战略的非制度性来源
33011.authors: Maria Angélica Bautista, Juan Sebastián Galán, James A. Robinson, Rafael F. Torres, Ragnar Torvik
33011.abstract: Political leaders make policy choices which are often hard to explain via institutions. We use the behavior of Colombian paramilitary groups as an environment to study non-institutional sources of variation in how public good provision and violence are combined to control populations. We hypothesize that a significant source of variation stems from the social preferences of the paramilitary commanders. Reciprocators adopt a strategy of offering public goods in exchange for support, but also use violence to punish those who do not reciprocate back. Reciprocity, developed via childhood socialization, is a characteristic of rural “peasants”. We develop a model which generates these hypotheses and test them using a unique dataset compiled from transitional justice documents.
33011.zh_abstract: 政治领导人的政策选择往往难以通过制度来解释。我们利用哥伦比亚准军事组织的行为作为研究环境，探讨在如何结合公共品供给与暴力以控制民众方面，非制度性来源的差异。我们假设，一个重要的差异来源在于准军事指挥官的社会偏好。互惠者采取一种策略，即提供公共品以换取支持，但也使用暴力来惩罚那些不回报的人。互惠性是通过童年社会化形成的，是农村“农民”的一个特征。我们构建了一个模型来生成这些假设，并使用从过渡时期司法文件中编制的独特数据集对其进行了检验。

33010.title: Social Interactions, Information, and Preferences for Schools: Experimental Evidence from Los Angeles
33010.zh_title: 社会互动、信息与学校偏好：来自洛杉矶的实验证据
33010.abstract: This paper measures parents’ beliefs about school and peer quality, how information about each affects school choices and student outcomes, and how social interactions mediate these effects. Parents underestimate school quality and overestimate peer quality. Cross-randomized school and peer quality information combined with a spillover design shows that when parents received information, they and their neighbors’ preferences shifted toward higher value-added schools, underscoring stronger tastes for school quality and the role of social interactions. These demand responses translate into real educational gains. Students exposed to the improved information enroll in more effective schools, achieve higher test scores, report improved socio-emotional well-being, and are more likely to enroll in college. The experimental evidence shows parents value school effectiveness even conditional on peer quality and that improving the informational environment can elevate numerous policy-relevant outcomes.
33010.zh_abstract: 本文衡量了家长对学校质量和同伴质量的信念，关于每种质量的信息如何影响学校选择和学生成果，以及社会互动如何调节这些效应。家长低估了学校质量，高估了同伴质量。交叉随机化的学校质量和同伴质量信息，结合一个溢出效应设计表明，当家长收到信息时，他们及其邻居的偏好转向了增值更高的学校，这突显了家长对学校质量的更强偏好以及社会互动的作用。这些需求反应转化为真实的教育收益。接触到改进信息的学龄儿童进入了更有效的学校，取得了更高的考试成绩，报告了改善的社会情感福祉，并且更有可能进入大学。实验证据表明，即使在控制同伴质量的条件下，家长也重视学校效能，并且改善信息环境可以提升许多与政策相关的成果。

33009.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Occupation: Lessons from the United States Army
33009.zh_title: 职业的代际传递：来自美国陆军的教训
33009.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Matthew Gudgeon, Adam Isen, Corbin L. Miller, Richard W. Patterson
33009.abstract: This paper estimates causal intergenerational occupation transmission in the military using discontinuities in parents’ eligibility for service from the Armed Forces Qualification Test. A parent’s enlistment in the Army increases their children’s military service propensity by between 58% and 110%. Intergenerational occupational transmission rates vary by race and sex—they are highest for demographic groups whose parents gained the most economically from service and for same-sex parent-child pairs. Our findings provide new evidence on the mechanisms driving intergenerational occupation correlations and indicate increasing access to good occupations is an important channel for improving intergenerational economic mobility for less advantaged groups.
33009.zh_abstract: 本文利用武装部队资格测试中父母服役资格的不连续性，估计了军队中职业的代际因果传递。父母在陆军服役使其子女的从军倾向增加了58%至110%。代际职业传递率因种族和性别而异——对于其父母从服役中获得最大经济收益的人口群体以及同性别的亲子对而言，该比率最高。我们的发现为驱动代际职业相关性的机制提供了新证据，并表明增加获得良好职业的机会是改善弱势群体代际经济流动性的重要渠道。

33008.title: The Unintended Consequences of Merit-based Teacher Selection: Evidence from Large-scale Reform in Colombia
33008.zh_title: 基于绩效的教师选拔的非预期后果：来自哥伦比亚大规模改革的证据
33008.authors: Matias Busso, Sebastián Montaño, Juan S. Muñoz-Morales, Nolan G. Pope
33008.abstract: Teacher quality is a key factor in improving student academic achievement. As such, educational policymakers strive to design systems to hire the most effective teachers. This paper examines the effects of a national policy reform in Colombia that established a merit-based teacher-hiring system intended to enhance teacher quality and improve student learning. Implemented in 2005 for all public schools, the policy ties teacher-hiring decisions to candidates’ performance on an exam evaluating subject-specific knowledge and teaching aptitude. The implementation of the policy led to many experienced contract teachers being replaced by high exam-performing novice teachers. We find that though the policy sharply increased pre-college test scores of teachers, it also decreased the overall stock of teacher experience and led to sharp decreases in students’ exam performance and educational attainment. Using a difference-in-differences strategy to compare the outcomes of students from public and private schools over two decades, we show that the hiring reform decreased students’ performance on high school exit exams by 8 percent of a standard deviation, and reduced the likelihood that students enroll in and graduate from college by more than 10 percent. The results underscore that relying exclusively on specific ex ante measures of teacher quality to screen candidates, particularly at the expense of teacher experience, may unintentionally reduce students’ learning gains.
33008.zh_abstract: 教师质量是提高学生学业成绩的关键因素。因此，教育政策制定者努力设计系统以招聘最有效的教师。本文考察了哥伦比亚一项国家政策改革的影响，该改革建立了一个基于绩效的教师招聘系统，旨在提高教师质量并改善学生学习。该政策于2005年在所有公立学校实施，将教师招聘决策与候选人在评估学科知识和教学能力的考试中的表现挂钩。该政策的实施导致许多有经验的合同教师被考试表现优异的新手教师所取代。我们发现，尽管该政策大幅提高了教师的大学入学前考试成绩，但它也降低了教师经验的总体存量，并导致学生考试成绩和受教育程度的急剧下降。使用双重差分策略比较公立和私立学校学生在二十多年间的成果，我们表明，这项招聘改革使学生在高中毕业考试中的成绩下降了8%个标准差，并将学生进入大学和大学毕业的可能性降低了超过10%。这些结果强调，仅依赖特定的教师质量事前衡量标准来筛选候选人，特别是以牺牲教师经验为代价，可能会无意中减少学生的学习收益。

33007.title: Estimating the Regional Welfare Impact of Tariff Changes: Application to the United States
33007.zh_title: 估算关税变化的区域福利影响：以美国为例
33007.abstract: We propose an empirical method using a translog expenditure function to estimate the regional welfare impact of changes in import tariffs, and we apply this method to the United States. Tariff revenue is assumed to be distributed on a per-capita basis, so states with greater production will experience a welfare gain from tariffs on those products (due to rising producer surplus) while those with little production will lose (due to falling consumer surplus). Over 2002-17, we find that 28 states benefitted from reduced tariffs, with national welfare gains of $\$5.8$ billion or $\$50$ per household in 2017. These national gains were eliminated by the tariff increases after 2017, with national losses of $\$57$ per household in 2019 and rising to $\$103$ per household in 2022, but 25 states still gained. These estimates of the national losses from tariff increases are lower than found in other studies for the 2017-19 period, due to this study incorporating product exclusions that reduced the tariffs on certain products and also due to differences in the methods of calculation.
33007.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种实证方法，使用超越对数支出函数来估算进口关税变化对区域福利的影响，并将此方法应用于美国。假设关税收入按人均分配，因此，对于这些产品，产量较大的州将从关税中获得福利收益（由于生产者剩余增加），而产量较少的州将遭受损失（由于消费者剩余减少）。在2002年至2017年间，我们发现28个州从降低的关税中受益，2017年全国福利收益为58亿美元，即每户50美元。这些全国性收益在2017年后的关税增加中被抵消，2019年每户全国损失为57美元，到2022年上升至每户103美元，但仍有25个州获得收益。这些对关税增加造成的全国性损失的估计低于其他针对2017-2019年期间的研究结果，原因是本研究纳入了产品排除条款，这些条款降低了对某些产品的关税，同时也由于计算方法上的差异。

33006.title: Cross-Border Shopping: Evidence and Welfare Implications for Switzerland
33006.zh_title: 跨境购物：瑞士的证据与福利影响
33006.authors: Ariel Burstein, Sarah M. Lein, Jonathan Vogel
33006.abstract: Consumers access foreign goods by purchasing them domestically or shopping abroad. We present new facts on cross-border shopping by Swiss households showing, for example, that prices of identical products are lower in neighboring countries, cross-border shopping shares fall with distance to the border, and price gaps and cross-border shopping shares rose following the 2015 Swiss Franc appreciation. We use a simple model of cross-border shopping to quantify how variation across space in cross-border shopping results in heterogeneous changes in cost-of-living in response to changes in international prices such as the 2015 Swiss Franc Appreciation and the 2020 Covid-19-related closing of the border.
33006.zh_abstract: 消费者通过在国内购买或出国购物来获取外国商品。我们展示了瑞士家庭跨境购物的新事实，例如，相同产品的价格在邻国更低，跨境购物份额随距边境距离的增加而下降，以及价格差距和跨境购物份额在2015年瑞士法郎升值后上升。我们使用一个简单的跨境购物模型来量化，跨境购物在空间上的差异如何导致生活成本对国际价格变化（如2015年瑞士法郎升值和2020年与新冠疫情相关的边境关闭）的异质性反应。

33005.title: Do Elite Universities Overpay Their Faculty?
33005.zh_title: 精英大学是否向其教师支付过高薪酬？
33005.authors: Cesar Luis Garro-Marin, Shulamit Kahn, Kevin Lang
33005.abstract: Do elite universities overpay their faculty? Not if you believe the AKM model. However, although the AKM model fits well, it is unlikely to be the right interpretation in this case.
33005.zh_abstract: 精英大学是否向其教师支付过高薪酬？如果你相信AKM模型，答案是否定的。然而，尽管AKM模型拟合良好，但在这种情况下，它不太可能是正确的解释。

33004.title: Finance Without Exotic Risk
33004.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Rafael La Porta, Andrei Shleifer
33004.abstract: We address the joint hypothesis problem in cross-sectional asset pricing by using measured analyst expectations of earnings growth. We construct a firm-level measure of Expectations Based Returns (EBRs) that uses analyst forecast errors and revisions and shuts down any cross-sectional differences in required returns. We obtain three results. First, variation in EBRs accounts for a large chunk of cross-sectional return spreads in value, investment, size, and momentum factors. Second, time variation in these spreads is predictable, and proxied by predictable time variation in EBRs. This result holds even controlling for scaled price variables, which may capture time varying required return differentials. Third, firm characteristics typically viewed as capturing risk predict disappointment of expectations (and of EBRs). Overall, return spreads typically attributed to exotic risk factors are explained by predictable movements in non-rational expectations of firms’ earnings growth.
33004.zh_abstract: 我们通过使用分析师对盈利增长的实际预期来解决横截面资产定价中的联合假设问题。我们构建了一个基于预期的回报（EBRs）的公司层面指标，该指标利用分析师的预测误差和修正，并消除了所需回报的任何横截面差异。我们得到了三个结果。首先，EBRs的变动解释了价值、投资、规模和动量因子中横截面回报差异的很大一部分。其次，这些差异的时间变化是可预测的，并且由EBRs的可预测时间变化所代理。即使控制了可能捕捉时变所需回报差异的缩放价格变量，这一结果仍然成立。第三，通常被视为捕捉风险的公司特征预测了预期（以及EBRs）的落空。总体而言，通常归因于奇异风险因子的回报差异，可以通过公司盈利增长的非理性预期的可预测变动来解释。

33003.title: Currency Centrality in Equity Markets, Exchange Rates and Global Financial Cycles
33003.zh_title: 股票市场、汇率与全球金融周期中的货币中心性
33003.authors: Hélène Rey, Vania Stavrakeva, Jenny Tang
33003.abstract: The paper explores empirically the tight links between exchange rates and the global network of equity holdings. Exchange rates can be expressed in terms of “equity net currency supplies”, i.e. local currency stock market capitalization minus equity holdings, denominated in investors’ currencies, as well as elasticities, reflecting the “centrality” of currencies in global equity markets. The observed components of our exchange rate decomposition account for, on average, 95% of the monthly variation of 28 bilateral currency crosses vis-à-vis the USD and 98% vis-à-vis the EUR. We use the decomposition to elucidate the unique role of the USD in transmitting risk aversion and U.S. macroeconomic news throughout the global equity network. Our findings contribute towards explaining global financial cycles and “risk-on”/“risk-off” episodes.
33003.zh_abstract: 本文实证探讨了汇率与全球股票持有网络之间的紧密联系。汇率可以用“股票净货币供给”来表示，即以投资者货币计价的本地股票市场市值减去股票持有量，以及反映货币在全球股票市场中“中心性”的弹性。我们的汇率分解的观测成分平均解释了28种货币对美元双边汇率月度变动的95%，以及对欧元双边汇率月度变动的98%。我们利用这一分解来阐明美元在通过全球股票网络传递风险厌恶和美国宏观经济新闻方面的独特作用。我们的发现有助于解释全球金融周期和“风险偏好”/“风险规避”时期。

33002.title: Child Penalties and Parental Role Models: Classroom Exposure Effects
33002.zh_title: 子女惩罚与父母角色模型：课堂接触效应
33002.authors: Henrik Kleven, Giulia Olivero, Eleonora Patacchini
33002.abstract: This paper investigates whether the effects of children on the labor market outcomes of women relative to men—child penalties—are shaped by the work behavior of peers’ parents during adolescence. Leveraging quasi-random variation in the fraction of peers with working mothers across cohorts within schools, we find that greater exposure to working mothers reduces the child penalty in employment later in life. The effect is economically meaningful, precisely estimated, and robust across specifications. Evidence on mechanisms suggests that these effects are driven by exposure to maternal employment as a parental role model, shaping child-related gender gaps in the labor market.
33002.zh_abstract: 本文研究了子女对女性相对于男性劳动力市场结果的影响——即子女惩罚——是否受到青春期同伴父母工作行为的塑造。利用学校内不同年级队列中拥有在职母亲的同伴比例的外生变化，我们发现，更多地接触在职母亲会降低日后生活中就业方面的子女惩罚。这一效应在经济意义上显著，估计精确，并且在各种设定下稳健。关于机制的证据表明，这些效应是由将母亲就业作为父母角色模型的接触所驱动的，从而塑造了劳动力市场中与子女相关的性别差距。
33002.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：J13, J16, J21, J22

33001.title: Financial Advice and Investor Beliefs: Experimental Evidence on Active vs. Passive Strategies
33001.zh_title: 金融建议与投资者信念：关于主动与被动策略的实验证据
33001.abstract: Using a randomized controlled trial we test how retail investors assess and update their priors based on different types of financial advice, which either aligns with their priors or goes against it. We compare advice that emphasizes either the benefits of passive investment strategies (such as diversification and low fees) or active strategies (such as stock picking and market timing). We find that participants rate advice significantly higher when it aligns with their priors rather than contradicts them. But people update their beliefs about investment strategies in the direction of the advice they receive, independent of their priors. At the same time, there is significant heterogeneity based on the subjects’ financial literacy. Financially more literate subjects positively update in response to seeing passive advice, but most do not update (and rate the advice negatively) when exposed to active advice. In contrast, financially less literate subjects are strongly influenced by both types of advice. Finally, subjects rate the advice lower if the advisor is perceived to have misaligned incentives compared to when they are more aligned.
33001.zh_abstract: 通过一项随机对照试验，我们测试了散户投资者如何根据不同类型的金融建议来评估和更新他们的先验信念，这些建议要么与其先验信念一致，要么相悖。我们比较了强调被动投资策略（如分散化和低费用）或主动策略（如选股和市场择时）好处的建议。我们发现，当建议与其先验信念一致而非相悖时，参与者对建议的评价显著更高。但人们会朝着所收到建议的方向更新他们对投资策略的信念，而与其先验信念无关。同时，基于受试者的金融素养存在显著的异质性。金融素养较高的受试者在看到被动建议时会积极更新，但大多数人在接触主动建议时不会更新（并且对建议给予负面评价）。相比之下，金融素养较低的受试者则受到两种类型建议的强烈影响。最后，如果认为顾问的激励不匹配，与激励更匹配的情况相比，受试者对建议的评价更低。

33000.title: Capital-Skill Complementarity in Firms and in the Aggregate Economy
33000.zh_title: 企业与总体经济中的资本-技能互补性
33000.authors: Giuseppe Berlingieri, Filippo Boeri, Danial Lashkari, Jonathan Vogel
33000.abstract: We study capital-skill complementarity in a multi-sector framework featuring firm-specific, multi-factor production functions and allowing for firm-specific factor-price wedges. We characterize the elasticity of the skill premium to the price of capital equipment in terms of firm-level elasticities of substitution across factors, elasticities of substitution across firms and sectors, and factor intensities. Using French data, we provide credible identification of these firm-level elasticities. Combining these elements we offer the first identification of aggregate capital-skill complementarity that allows for arbitrary trends in the unobservable skill-bias of productivity at the firm, industry, and aggregate levels. We find an economically and statistically significant degree of aggregate capital-skill complementarity, but this force alone is insufficient to generate the full increase in the relative demand for high-skilled workers observed in the data. There is a substantial role for skill-augmenting technical change not embodied in capital equipment.
33000.zh_abstract: 我们在一个多部门框架中研究资本-技能互补性，该框架具有企业特定的多要素生产函数，并允许企业特定的要素价格楔子。我们以企业层面的要素间替代弹性、企业与部门间的替代弹性以及要素密集度来刻画技能溢价对资本设备价格的弹性。利用法国数据，我们提供了这些企业层面弹性的可信识别。结合这些要素，我们首次识别了总体资本-技能互补性，同时允许企业、行业和总体层面不可观测的技能偏向型技术进步存在任意趋势。我们发现总体资本-技能互补性在经济和统计上均显著，但仅凭这一力量不足以产生数据中观察到的高技能工人相对需求的全部增长。技能增进型技术进步（并非体现在资本设备中）发挥了重要作用。

33038.title: Parents' Earnings and the Returns to Universal Pre-Kindergarten
33038.zh_title: 父母收入与普及型学前教育的回报
33038.authors: John Eric Humphries, Christopher Neilson, Xiaoyang Ye, Seth D. Zimmerman
33038.abstract: This paper asks whether universal pre-kindergarten (UPK) programs can increase parental earnings and, if so, how much these gains affect the economic returns to UPK. Using admissions lotteries for an extended-day UPK program in New Haven, Connecticut, we find that UPK enrollment increases childcare coverage to span the workday and raises parents’ earnings by 21.7% during pre-kindergarten. Gains persist for at least six years. We find little evidence of effects on children’s academic and behavioral outcomes during elementary and middle school. Combining these results, we demonstrate that tax revenues from parents’ earnings gains reduce the net government costs of UPK by 90% relative to estimates that ignore gains for parents. Overall, we estimate that each dollar spent yields $\$10$ in benefits. Our findings demonstrate the potential of UPK programs that combine quality education with full-day childcare and underscore the importance of thinking about parents when designing and evaluating early-childhood policies.
33038.zh_abstract: 本文探讨普及型学前教育（UPK）项目能否提高父母收入，以及这些收益如何影响UPK的经济回报。利用康涅狄格州纽黑文市一个延长日间UPK项目的入学抽签数据，我们发现，UPK入学使儿童保育覆盖整个工作日，并在学前教育期间将父母收入提高21.7%。这些收益至少持续六年。我们几乎没有发现UPK对小学和初中阶段儿童学业及行为结果产生影响的证据。综合这些结果，我们证明，与忽略父母收益的估计相比，来自父母收入增长的税收收入使UPK的政府净成本降低了90%。总体而言，我们估计每花费1美元可产生10美元的收益。我们的研究结果展示了将优质教育与全日制儿童保育相结合的UPK项目的潜力，并强调了在设计和评估儿童早期政策时考虑父母因素的重要性。
33038.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H43, I20, J13, J24

33037.title: Trading Volume Alpha
33037.authors: Ruslan Goyenko, Bryan T. Kelly, Tobias J. Moskowitz, Yinan Su, Chao Zhang
33037.abstract: Portfolio optimization focuses on risk and return prediction, yet implementation costs critically matter. Predicting trading costs is challenging because costs depend on trade size and trader identity, thus impeding a generic solution. We focus on a component of trading costs that applies universally – trading volume. Individual stock trading volume is highly predictable, especially with machine learning. We model the economic benefits of predicting volume through a portfolio framework that trades off tracking error versus net-of-cost performance – translating volume prediction into net-of-cost alpha. The economic benefits of predicting individual stock volume are as large as those from stock return predictability.
33037.zh_abstract: 投资组合优化侧重于风险和收益预测，但执行成本至关重要。预测交易成本具有挑战性，因为成本取决于交易规模和交易者身份，从而阻碍了通用解决方案。我们专注于交易成本中一个普遍适用的组成部分——交易量。个股交易量具有高度可预测性，尤其是在使用机器学习时。我们通过一个在跟踪误差与净成本绩效之间进行权衡的投资组合框架，对预测交易量的经济收益进行建模，从而将交易量预测转化为净成本阿尔法。预测个股交易量的经济收益与股票收益可预测性的收益一样大。
33037.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C45, C53, C55, G00, G11, G12, G17

33036.title: Decarbonizing Heat: The Impact of Heat Pumps and a Time-of-Use Heat Pump Tariff on Energy Demand
33036.zh_title: 供热脱碳：热泵及热泵分时电价对能源需求的影响
33036.authors: Louise Bernard, Andy Hackett, Robert D. Metcalfe, Andrew Schein
33036.abstract: Heat pumps have been proposed as the leading technology in the electrification of domestic heat and therefore could play a crucial part in the transition to low-carbon energy systems. However, there is very little causal evidence of the impact of heat pumps on energy demand and the impact of marginal prices to help optimize energy demand with heat pumps. We leverage a staggered roll-out of heat pumps from Octopus Energy Group to show that: (1) heat pumps have a large impact on energy demand, on average causing a 90% reduction in home gas use and a 61% increase in home electricity use – overall, households reduced total energy demand by 40% and carbon dioxide emissions by 36% in 2024 (with an average of 68% emissions savings over the lifetime of the heat pump); (2) a time-of-use tariff designed for heat pumps can provide large demand flexibility benefits, halving electricity consumption during the evening peak to help balance the grid, and that load shifting is possible on the coldest days and from all building types in our sample; (3) the marginal value of public funds of the current UK heat pump subsidy is £1.24 (for every £1 spent by the Government). Overall, we find that heat pumps can meaningfully decarbonize heat and subsidies to encourage heat pumps can be welfare-enhancing.
33036.zh_abstract: 热泵已被提议作为家庭供热电气化的领先技术，因此在向低碳能源系统转型中可能发挥关键作用。然而，关于热泵对能源需求的影响以及有助于优化热泵能源需求的边际价格，几乎没有因果证据。我们利用Octopus Energy Group分阶段推广热泵的数据表明：（1）热泵对能源需求有巨大影响，平均使家庭燃气使用量减少90%，家庭用电量增加61%——总体而言，到2024年，家庭总能源需求减少40%，二氧化碳排放量减少36%（在热泵整个生命周期内平均减排68%）；（2）为热泵设计的分时电价可带来巨大的需求灵活性效益，将晚间高峰时段的用电量减半以帮助平衡电网，并且在我们样本中最冷的天气和所有建筑类型中均可实现负荷转移；（3）当前英国热泵补贴的公共资金边际价值为1.24英镑（政府每支出1英镑）。总体而言，我们发现热泵可以有效实现供热脱碳，而鼓励使用热泵的补贴可以提高福利。

33035.title: Understanding the Heterogeneity of Intergenerational Mobility across Neighborhoods
33035.zh_title: 理解代际流动性在社区间的异质性
33035.authors: Neil A. Cholli, Steven N. Durlauf, Rasmus Landersø, Salvador Navarro
33035.abstract: Recent research has uncovered large spatial heterogeneity in intergenerational mobility across neighborhoods in countries around the world. Yet there is little consensus on the reasons why mobility is high in some neighborhoods and low in others. This paper analyzes a generalized mobility model that examines the roles that families’ selection into neighborhoods and locational characteristics play in generating this spatial heterogeneity. We use administrative data from Denmark to decompose variation in mobility across nearly 300 larger and 2,000 smaller neighborhoods along these dimensions, accounting for sampling error. Families’ selection into neighborhoods and sampling error explain most observed heterogeneity across neighborhoods. Our generalized model explains most of the differences in mobility between neighborhoods, though a small but persistent difference remains between neighborhoods that our model cannot account for. An analysis of this “irreducible heterogeneity” suggests that neighborhoods exhibit multiple types in terms of their mobility effects.
33035.zh_abstract: 最近的研究发现，世界各国的代际流动性在社区间存在巨大的空间异质性。然而，对于为什么某些社区流动性高而其他社区流动性低，几乎没有共识。本文分析了一个广义流动性模型，考察家庭对社区的选择以及区位特征在产生这种空间异质性中的作用。我们使用丹麦的行政数据，沿着这些维度分解近300个较大社区和2000个较小社区之间流动性的变异，并考虑了抽样误差。家庭对社区的选择和抽样误差解释了观察到的社区间大部分异质性。我们的广义模型解释了社区间流动性差异的大部分，尽管模型无法解释的社区间仍存在微小但持续的差异。对这种“不可还原的异质性”的分析表明，社区在其流动性效应方面表现出多种类型。
33035.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D30, H0, J0, R0

33034.title: On the Optimal Allocation of Policy-Making
33034.zh_title: 论政策制定的最优分配
33034.authors: Alessandro Dovis, Rishabh Kirpalani, Guillaume M. Sublet
33034.abstract: How should society allocate policy-making between the legislative and the executive branches of government? We analyze a model in which biased and polarized policymakers set policy in response to shocks. We show that policy issues for which the policy-maker bias is small relative to the degree of polarization should be delegated to the legislature, while policy issues where the bias is large should be delegated to the executive. Moreover, when executive delegation is preferred, it is optimal to leave little discretion and impose a narrow mandate. This finding contrasts with conventional wisdom that executive delegation allows for greater flexibility. The main difference between the two institutional settings is the ability to restrict ex post bargaining under executive delegation. Thus, when the bias is large, executive delegation is preferred because it can effectively constrain policymakers' choices. In contrast, when the bias is small, the ability to bargain ex post allows for flexible responses to severe shocks while limiting political risk. We also study the credibility of these institutions and show that while delegating to the legislature is typically credible, executive delegation is typically not when the bias is exogenous but can be when the bias arises from time inconsistency problems.
33034.zh_abstract: 社会应如何在政府的立法和行政部门之间分配政策制定权？我们分析了一个模型，其中存在偏见和两极分化的政策制定者根据冲击制定政策。我们表明，对于政策制定者偏见相对于两极分化程度较小的政策问题，应委托给立法机构；而对于偏见较大的政策问题，应委托给行政部门。此外，当倾向于行政委托时，最优做法是留下很少的自由裁量权并施加狭窄的授权。这一发现与传统观点（即行政委托允许更大的灵活性）相悖。两种制度设置之间的主要区别在于行政委托下限制事后讨价还价的能力。因此，当偏见较大时，行政委托更受青睐，因为它可以有效约束政策制定者的选择。相比之下，当偏见较小时，事后讨价还价的能力允许对严重冲击做出灵活反应，同时限制政治风险。我们还研究了这些制度的可信度，并表明，虽然委托给立法机构通常是可信的，但当偏见是外生时，行政委托通常不可信，但当偏见源于时间不一致问题时，行政委托则可能是可信的。

33033.title: Theorizing with Large Language Models
33033.zh_title: 利用大型语言模型进行理论构建
33033.authors: Matteo Tranchero, Cecil-Francis Brenninkmeijer, Arul Murugan, Abhishek Nagaraj
33033.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are proving to be a powerful toolkit for management and organizational research. While early work has largely focused on the value of these tools for data processing and replicating survey-based research, the potential of LLMs for theory building is yet to be recognized. We argue that LLMs can accelerate the pace at which researchers can develop, validate, and extend strategic management theory. We propose a novel framework called Generative AI-Based Experimentation (GABE) that enables researchers to conduct exploratory in silico experiments that can mirror the complexities of real-world organizational settings, featuring multiple agents and strategic interdependencies. This approach is unique because it allows researchers to unpack the mechanisms behind results by directly modifying agents’ roles, preferences, and capabilities, and asking them to reveal the explanations behind decisions. We apply this framework to a novel theory studying strategic exploration under uncertainty. We show how our framework can not only replicate the results from experiments with human subjects at a much lower cost, but can also be used to extend theory by clarifying boundary conditions and uncovering mechanisms. We conclude that LLMs possess tremendous potential to complement existing methods for theorizing in strategy and, more broadly, the social sciences.
33033.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型（LLM）正被证明是管理和组织研究的有力工具包。虽然早期工作主要关注这些工具在数据处理和复制基于调查的研究方面的价值，但LLM在理论构建方面的潜力尚未得到充分认识。我们认为，LLM可以加速研究人员开发、验证和扩展战略管理理论的速度。我们提出了一个名为“基于生成式人工智能的实验”（GABE）的新框架，使研究人员能够进行探索性的计算机模拟实验，这些实验可以反映现实组织环境的复杂性，具有多个主体和战略相互依赖性。这种方法的独特之处在于，它允许研究人员通过直接修改主体的角色、偏好和能力，并要求他们揭示决策背后的解释，来揭示结果背后的机制。我们将此框架应用于一项关于不确定性下战略探索的新理论。我们展示了我们的框架如何不仅能以低得多的成本复制人类受试者实验的结果，还能通过阐明边界条件和揭示机制来扩展理论。我们得出结论，LLM具有巨大潜力，可以补充战略学以及更广泛的社会科学中现有的理论构建方法。

33032.title: The Effects of “Buy American”: Electric Vehicles and the Inflation Reduction Act
33032.zh_title: “购买美国货”的影响：电动汽车与《通胀削减法案》
33032.authors: Hunt Allcott, Reigner Kane, Maximilian S. Maydanchik, Joseph S. Shapiro, Felix Tintelnot
33032.abstract: We provide the first ex post microeconomic welfare analysis of the electric vehicle (EV) tax credits in the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). Relative to pre-IRA policy, the credits generated $\$1.96$ in domestic benefits per dollar of government spending, with taxpayer cost of $\$36,500$ per additional EV. Relative to having no EV credits, they yielded $\$1.11$ in domestic benefits per dollar of government spending. A leasing loophole that sidestepped domestic content rules created negative domestic benefits. A prominent example of green industrial policy, the credits harmed foreign countries by shifting surplus to domestic producers and helped them by decreasing CO₂ emissions.
33032.zh_abstract: 我们提供了《通胀削减法案》（IRA）中电动汽车（EV）税收抵免的首个事后微观经济福利分析。相对于IRA前的政策，这些抵免每1美元政府支出产生了1.96美元的国内收益，纳税人每增加一辆电动汽车的成本为36,500美元。相对于没有电动汽车抵免的情况，它们每1美元政府支出产生了1.11美元的国内收益。一个规避国内成分规则的租赁漏洞产生了负的国内收益。作为绿色产业政策的一个突出例子，这些抵免通过将剩余转移给国内生产者而损害了外国，并通过减少二氧化碳排放而帮助了它们。
33032.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, ITI, PE；JEL：F18, H23, L11, Q58

33031.title: Do Workers Undervalue COVID-19 Risk? Evidence from Wages and Death Certificate Data
33031.zh_title: 工人是否低估了COVID-19风险？来自工资和死亡证明数据的证据
33031.authors: Cong T. Gian, Sumedha Gupta, Kosali I. Simon, Ryan Sullivan, Coady Wing
33031.abstract: When mortality risks of a job increase, economic theory predicts that wages will rise to compensate workers. COVID-19 became a new source of mortality risk from close contact with other workers and customers. Real wages have risen during the COVID-19 era, but research to date has been sparse on how much of this increase reflects compensating wage differentials for COVID-19 risk on the job. We use 2020- 2021 death certificate data which for the first time includes the decedent’s occupation and industry, together with other occupational and industry mortality for previous years from the Census of Fatal Occupational Injuries (CFOI) and wage data from the Current Population Survey (CPS) to examine whether compensating wage differentials for COVID-19 occupational risks are in line with prior estimates of Values of Statistical Life (VSL). First, we find that there are substantial differences in the compensating differentials associated with COVID-19 vs other sources of job-related mortality risk. Full time workers’ pay is higher by $\$24$ per week in jobs with a 1 in 1,000 higher risk of COVID-19 mortality, but their pay is $\$320$ higher in jobs with 1 in 1,000 higher risk of non-COVID-19 workplace mortality. The non-COVID-19 mortality wage premiums imply that workers trade off money and mortality risk using a VSL of about $\$18$ million, which is near the upper range of the most cited VSL estimates in the literature. In contrast, the COVID-19 wage premium implies that workers make decisions using a VSL of the range $\$1.24$ - $\$1.54$ million, much lower than standard VSL measures. The results are consistent with workers substantially underestimating or undervaluing the risk of COVID-19 mortality.
33031.zh_abstract: 当工作的死亡风险增加时，经济理论预测工资将上升以补偿工人。COVID-19成为因与其他工人和客户密切接触而产生的新死亡风险来源。在COVID-19时代，实际工资有所上升，但迄今为止的研究很少关注这种增长在多大程度上反映了对工作中COVID-19风险的补偿性工资差异。我们使用2020-2021年死亡证明数据（该数据首次包含死者的职业和行业），结合来自致命职业伤害普查（CFOI）的前几年其他职业和行业死亡率数据，以及来自当前人口调查（CPS）的工资数据，来检验与COVID-19职业风险相关的补偿性工资差异是否与先前统计生命价值（VSL）的估计一致。首先，我们发现与COVID-19相关的补偿性差异与其他工作相关死亡风险来源之间存在显著差异。全职员工在COVID-19死亡风险每增加千分之一的岗位上，周薪高出24美元，但在非COVID-19工作场所死亡风险每增加千分之一的岗位上，周薪高出320美元。非COVID-19死亡率的工资溢价意味着工人以约1800万美元的VSL在金钱和死亡风险之间进行权衡，这接近文献中最常引用的VSL估计值的上限范围。相比之下，COVID-19工资溢价意味着工人以124万至154万美元范围的VSL做出决策，远低于标准VSL衡量指标。这些结果与工人严重低估或低估COVID-19死亡风险的情况一致。

33030.title: Old and Connected versus Young and Creative: Networks and the Diffusion of New Scientific Ideas
33030.zh_title: 年长且人脉广与年轻且富创意：网络与新科学思想的扩散
33030.abstract: The adoption of new ideas is critical for realizing their full potential and for advancing the knowledge frontier but it involves analyzing innovators, potential adopters, and the networks that connect them. This paper applies natural language processing, network analysis, and a novel fixed effects strategy to study how the aging of the biomedical research workforce affects idea adoption. We show that the relationship between adoption and innovator career age varies with network distance. Specifically, at short distances, young innovators’ ideas are adopted the most, while at greater network distances, mid-career innovators’ ideas have the highest adoption. The main reason for this contrast is that young innovators are close to young potential adopters who are more open to new ideas, but mid-career innovators are more central in networks. Overall adoption is hump-shaped in the career age of innovators. Simulations show that the aging of innovators and of potential adopters have comparable effects on the adoption of important new ideas.
33030.zh_abstract: 新思想的采纳对于实现其全部潜力和推进知识前沿至关重要，但这涉及对创新者、潜在采纳者以及连接他们的网络进行分析。本文运用自然语言处理、网络分析和一种新颖的固定效应策略，研究生物医学研究队伍的老龄化如何影响思想采纳。我们表明，采纳率与创新者职业生涯年龄之间的关系随网络距离而变化。具体而言，在短距离内，年轻创新者的思想被采纳得最多；而在较远的网络距离上，职业生涯中期的创新者的思想具有最高的采纳率。造成这种对比的主要原因是，年轻创新者更接近对新鲜思想更开放的年轻潜在采纳者，而职业生涯中期的创新者在网络中处于更核心的位置。总体采纳率随创新者职业生涯年龄呈驼峰形。模拟表明，创新者的老龄化和潜在采纳者的老龄化对重要新思想的采纳具有可比的影响。

33029.title: Cross-Country Analysis of Labor Markets during the COVID-19 Pandemic
33029.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间劳动力市场的跨国分析
33029.authors: Robert Breunig, Wei Cheng, Laura Montenovo, Kyoung Hoon Lee, Bruce A. Weinberg, Yinjunjie Zhang
33029.abstract: The authors study employment outcomes during the early stages of the COVID-19 pandemic in eight countries with different case levels and policy responses: the United States, Australia, France, Denmark, Italy, South Korea, Spain, and Sweden. While the share of people not at work increased in all countries, safety net policies seem to influence whether people remained employed (but absent from work) versus unemployed or left the labor force. The authors find large employment decreases among middle-educated and young workers, increasing disparities in countries with the largest labor market declines. A variety of evidence suggests that labor demand was likely a larger driver of employment declines than labor supply and that stringent social distancing policies were sufficient to reduce employment even in the absence of high cases. Lastly, job characteristics - the importance of face-to-face interactions and the ability to work remotely - were closely related to labor market outcomes, with these relationships being stronger in countries with more cases.
33029.zh_abstract: 作者研究了COVID-19大流行早期阶段八个国家的就业结果，这些国家具有不同的病例水平和政策应对措施：美国、澳大利亚、法国、丹麦、意大利、韩国、西班牙和瑞典。虽然所有国家未在工作的人数比例都有所增加，但安全网政策似乎影响了人们是保持就业（但缺勤）还是失业或退出劳动力市场。作者发现，中等教育程度和年轻工人的就业大幅下降，在劳动力市场下降幅度最大的国家中，不平等现象加剧。多种证据表明，劳动力需求可能是就业下降的更大驱动因素，而非劳动力供给，并且严格的社会疏离政策即使在病例不多的情况下也足以减少就业。最后，工作特征——面对面互动的重要性和远程工作的能力——与劳动力市场结果密切相关，这些关系在病例较多的国家更为显著。

33028.title: The Economic Impacts of Clean Power
33028.abstract: In this paper we assess the economic impacts of moving to a renewable-dominated grid in the US. We use projections of capital costs to develop price bounds on future wholesale power prices at the local geographic level. We then use a class of spatial general equilibrium models to estimate the effect on wages and output of prices falling below these bounds in the medium term. Power prices fall anywhere between 20% and 80%, depending on local solar resources, leading to an aggregate real wage gain of 2-3%. Over the longer term, we show how moving to clean power represents a qualitative change in the aggregate growth process, alleviating the “resource drag” that has slowed recent productivity growth in the US.
33028.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们评估了美国向以可再生能源为主的电网转型的经济影响。我们利用资本成本预测来制定地方地理层面未来批发电价的价格区间。然后，我们使用一类空间一般均衡模型来估计中期内价格低于这些区间对工资和产出的影响。电力价格下降幅度在20%到80%之间，具体取决于当地的太阳能资源，导致总体实际工资增长2-3%。从长期来看，我们展示了向清洁电力转型如何代表总体增长过程中的质变，缓解了近年来减缓美国生产率增长的“资源拖累”。
33028.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：E60, O4, Q40, Q42, Q43, Q57, R13

33027.title: Here Today, Gone Tomorrow? Toward an Understanding of Fade-out in Early Childhood Education Programs
33027.zh_title: 今日在此，明日消失？理解早期儿童教育项目的效果消退现象
33027.abstract: An unsettling stylized fact is that decorated early childhood education programs improve cognitive skills in the short-term, but lose their efficacy after a few years. We implement a field experiment with two stages of randomization to explore the underpinnings of the fade-out effect. We first randomly assign preschool access to children, and then partner with the local school district to randomly assign the same children to classmates throughout elementary school. We find that the fade-out effect is critically-linked to the share of classroom peers assigned to preschool access—with enough treated peers the classic fade-out effect is muted. Our results highlight a paradoxical insight: while the fade-out effect has been viewed as a devastating critique of early childhood programs, our results highlight that fade-out is a key rationale for providing early education to all children. This is because human capital accumulation is inherently a social activity, leading early education programs to deliver their largest benefits at scale when everyone receives such programs.
33027.zh_abstract: 一个令人不安的典型事实是，备受赞誉的早期儿童教育项目能在短期内提高认知技能，但几年后就会失去效力。我们实施了一项包含两阶段随机化的实地实验，以探索效果消退现象的基础。我们首先随机分配儿童接受学前教育的机会，然后与当地学区合作，将同一批儿童随机分配到整个小学阶段的同班同学中。我们发现，效果消退现象与获得学前教育机会的同班同学比例密切相关——当有足够多的受处理同伴时，经典的效果消退现象就会被抑制。我们的结果突出了一个矛盾的见解：虽然效果消退现象被视为对早期儿童项目的严厉批评，但我们的结果强调，效果消退是为所有儿童提供早期教育的关键理由。这是因为人力资本积累本质上是一种社会活动，导致早期教育项目在所有人都接受此类项目时，才能大规模地发挥其最大效益。

33026.title: A Flexible, Heterogeneous Treatment Effects Difference-in-Differences Estimator for Repeated Cross-Sections
33026.zh_title: 针对重复截面数据的灵活异质性处理效应双重差分估计量
33026.authors: Partha Deb, Edward C. Norton, Jeffrey M. Wooldridge, Jeffrey E. Zabel
33026.abstract: This paper proposes a method to estimate treatment effects in difference-in-differences designs for repeated cross-section data in which the treatment start is staggered over time and treatment effects are heterogeneous by group, time, and observation-level covariates. We show that a linear-in-parameters regression specification with a sufficiently flexible functional form consisting of group-by-time treatment effects, two-way fixed effects, and interaction terms yields consistent estimates of heterogeneous treatment effects under general conditions. We also show that our method is identical to an imputation estimator. Under homoskedasticity assumptions the estimators are efficient, and aggregation of the treatment effects and inference are straightforward. We illustrate the use of this flexible linear model estimated by OLS with covariates (X) – FLEX – with an empirical example and provide comparisons to some benchmark estimators.
33026.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种方法，用于估计重复截面数据双重差分设计中的处理效应，其中处理开始时间随时间交错，且处理效应因组别、时间和观测层面协变量而异。我们表明，一个具有足够灵活函数形式的线性参数回归设定，包含组别-时间交互处理效应、双向固定效应和交互项，能在一般条件下得到异质性处理效应的一致估计。我们还表明，我们的方法与插补估计量相同。在同方差假设下，估计量是有效的，并且处理效应的汇总和推断都很直接。我们通过一个实证示例说明了这种由OLS估计的带协变量（X）的灵活线性模型（FLEX）的使用，并与一些基准估计量进行了比较。

33025.title: 12 Best Practices for Leveraging Generative AI in Experimental Research
33025.zh_title: 在实验研究中利用生成式人工智能的12项最佳实践
33025.authors: Samuel Chang, Andrew Kennedy, Aaron Leonard, John A. List
33025.abstract: We provide twelve best practices and discuss how each practice can help researchers accurately, credibly, and ethically use Generative AI (GenAI) to enhance experimental research. We split the twelve practices into four areas. First, in the pre-treatment stage, we discuss how GenAI can aid in pre-registration procedures, data privacy concerns, and ethical considerations specific to GenAI usage. Second, in the design and implementation stage, we focus on GenAI’s role in identifying new channels of variation, piloting and documentation, and upholding the four exclusion restrictions. Third, in the analysis stage, we explore how prompting and training set bias can impact results as well as necessary steps to ensure replicability. Finally, we discuss forward-looking best practices that are likely to gain importance as GenAI evolves.
33025.zh_abstract: 我们提供了十二项最佳实践，并讨论了每项实践如何帮助研究人员准确、可信且合乎道德地使用生成式人工智能（GenAI）来增强实验研究。我们将这十二项实践分为四个领域。首先，在处理前阶段，我们讨论了GenAI如何在预注册程序、数据隐私问题以及GenAI使用特有的伦理考量方面提供帮助。其次，在设计和实施阶段，我们重点关注GenAI在识别新的变异渠道、试点和文档记录以及维护四个排除限制方面的作用。第三，在分析阶段，我们探讨了提示和训练集偏差如何影响结果，以及确保可复制性所需的必要步骤。最后，我们讨论了前瞻性的最佳实践，这些实践随着GenAI的发展可能会变得越来越重要。
33025.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C9, C90, C91, C92, C93

33024.title: Carbon Tariffs 101
33024.abstract: We evaluate the economic and environmental consequences of taxes on imported goods based on their carbon content. The analysis uses the simplest possible partial equilibrium framework, with one small open economy and a global pollution externality. It relies on graphs of supply and demand, rather than equations or formulas, hoping to reach readers familiar with basic economics. Despite its simplicity, the framework imparts numerous lessons. (1) Absent a domestic price on carbon, a carbon tariff imposes the same costs on domestic consumers as a domestic carbon price, but a carbon tariff also subsidizes domestic pollution. (2) If one small country imposes a carbon tariff, with or without a domestic carbon tax, the economic incidence of the tariff falls on its consumers. (3) If a holdout country joins the rest of the world by enacting its own carbon regulation and consequently imports more from other countries, those increased imports are not “leakage.” They are the cessation of leakage from when the holdout country’s policy was lax. And (4) if other countries do not appropriately regulate emissions, no single small country can use a combination of carbon taxes and carbon tariffs to fully correct the problem caused by its consumers or producers.
33024.zh_abstract: 我们评估了基于进口商品碳含量对其征税的经济和环境后果。该分析使用了最简单的局部均衡框架，包含一个小型开放经济和全球污染外部性。它依赖于供需图表，而非方程或公式，希望能触及熟悉基础经济学的读者。尽管框架简单，但它提供了许多启示。(1) 在国内没有碳价的情况下，碳关税给国内消费者带来的成本与国内碳价相同，但碳关税也补贴了国内污染。(2) 如果一个小国征收碳关税，无论是否同时征收国内碳税，该关税的经济负担都落在其消费者身上。(3) 如果一个观望国家通过制定自己的碳法规加入世界其他国家，并因此从其他国家进口更多商品，这些增加的进口并非“泄漏”。它们是该观望国家政策宽松时泄漏的停止。(4) 如果其他国家没有适当监管排放，任何单一小国都无法通过碳税和碳关税的组合来完全纠正其消费者或生产者造成的问题。

33023.title: Transmission of Family Influence
33023.authors: Sadegh S.M. Eshaghnia, James J. Heckman, Rasmus Landersø, Rafeh Qureshi
33023.abstract: This paper studies intergenerational mobility—the transmission of family influence. We develop and estimate measures of lifetime resources motivated by economic theory that account for differences in life-cycle trajectories, and uncertainty about future income. We identify the effects of parents’ resources on child outcomes through policy shocks at different childhood ages that affect family investments. Parents’ expected lifetime resources are stronger predictors of child outcomes than the income measures traditionally used in the literature on social mobility. Moreover, while effects estimated through exogenous variation in parents’ expected lifetime resources are smaller in magnitude than their correlational counterparts, they are still sizable and largest in early childhood. The paper illustrates how integrating key insights from different literatures when studying intergenerational mobility allows for a better understanding of the importance of factors such as the family’s role, changes in individual life cycles across generations, and the expectations and trajectories individuals face across their lifetimes.
33023.zh_abstract: 本文研究代际流动性——家庭影响的传递。我们基于经济理论开发并估计了终身资源的度量指标，这些指标考虑了生命周期轨迹的差异以及未来收入的不确定性。我们通过影响家庭投资的、不同童年年龄的政策冲击，识别了父母资源对子女结果的影响。父母预期的终身资源比社会流动性文献中传统使用的收入指标更能预测子女结果。此外，虽然通过父母预期终身资源的外生变化估计的效应在幅度上小于其相关对应物，但它们仍然相当可观，并且在儿童早期最大。本文说明了在研究代际流动性时，整合不同文献的关键见解如何能够更好地理解诸如家庭角色、跨代个体生命周期变化以及个体一生中所面临的期望和轨迹等因素的重要性。

33022.title: Is Distance from Innovation a Barrier to the Adoption of Artificial Intelligence?
33022.zh_title: 距离创新中心是否阻碍了人工智能的采用？
33022.authors: Jennifer Hunt, Iain M. Cockburn, James Bessen
33022.abstract: Using our own data on Artificial Intelligence publications merged with Burning Glass vacancy data for 2007-2019, we investigate whether online vacancies for jobs requiring AI skills grow more slowly in U.S. locations farther from pre-2007 AI innovation hotspots. We find that a commuting zone which is an additional 200km (125 miles) from the closest AI hotspot has 17% lower growth in AI jobs' share of vacancies. This is driven by distance from AI papers rather than AI patents. Distance reduces growth in AI research jobs as well as in jobs adapting AI to new industries, as evidenced by strong effects for computer and mathematical researchers, developers of software applications, and the finance and insurance industry. 20% of the effect is explained by the presence of state borders between some commuting zones and their closest hotspot. This could reflect state borders impeding migration and thus flows of tacit knowledge. Distance does not capture difficulty of in-person or remote collaboration nor knowledge and personnel flows within multi-establishment firms hiring in computer occupations.
33022.zh_abstract: 利用我们自建的人工智能出版物数据，结合2007-2019年Burning Glass职位空缺数据，我们研究了美国距离2007年前人工智能创新热点较远的地区，其需要AI技能的在线职位空缺增长是否较慢。我们发现，一个通勤区若距离最近的AI热点额外远200公里（125英里），其AI职位在总空缺中的占比增长率会低17%。这一效应主要由与AI论文的距离驱动，而非AI专利的距离。距离不仅降低了AI研究岗位的增长，也降低了将AI应用于新行业的岗位的增长，这体现在对计算机与数学研究人员、软件应用开发者以及金融和保险行业的显著影响上。该效应的20%可由某些通勤区与其最近热点之间存在州界来解释。这可能反映了州界阻碍了人口迁移，进而阻碍了隐性知识的流动。距离并不能反映面对面或远程协作的难度，也不能反映在招聘计算机职业的多机构企业内部的知识和人员流动。

33021.title: The ABC’s of Who Benefits from Working with AI: Ability, Beliefs, and Calibration
33021.zh_title: 与AI合作受益者的ABC：能力、信念与校准
33021.authors: Andrew Caplin, David J. Deming, Shangwen Li, Daniel J. Martin, Philip Marx, Ben Weidmann, Kadachi Jiada Ye
33021.abstract: We use a controlled experiment to show that ability and belief calibration jointly determine the benefits of working with Artificial Intelligence (AI). AI improves performance more for people with low baseline ability. However, holding ability constant, AI assistance is more valuable for people who are calibrated, meaning they have accurate beliefs about their own ability. People who know they have low ability gain the most from working with AI. In a counterfactual analysis, we show that eliminating miscalibration would cause AI to reduce performance inequality nearly twice as much as it already does.
33021.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项受控实验表明，能力和信念校准共同决定了与人工智能（AI）合作的收益。AI对基线能力较低的人绩效提升更大。然而，在能力不变的情况下，AI辅助对校准型个体（即对自己能力有准确信念的人）更有价值。知道自己能力低的人从与AI合作中获益最多。在一项反事实分析中，我们表明，消除校准偏差将使AI对绩效不平等的降低幅度比现有水平增加近一倍。

33020.title: Describing Deferred Acceptance and Strategyproofness to Participants: Experimental Analysis
33020.zh_title: 向参与者描述延迟接受机制与策略防护性：实验分析
33020.authors: Yannai A. Gonczarowski, Ori Heffetz, Guy Ishai, Clayton Thomas
33020.abstract: We conduct an incentivized lab experiment to test participants' ability to understand the DA matching mechanism and the strategyproofness property, conveyed in different ways. We find that while many participants can (using a novel GUI) learn DA's mechanics and calculate its outcomes, such understanding does not imply understanding of strategyproofness (as measured by specially designed tests). However, a novel menu description of strategyproofness conveys this property significantly better than other treatments. While behavioral effects are small on average, participants with levels of strategyproofness understanding above a certain threshold play the classical dominant strategy at very high rates.
33020.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项激励性实验室实验，测试参与者理解DA匹配机制和策略防护性属性的能力，这些属性以不同方式传达。我们发现，虽然许多参与者能够（使用新颖的图形用户界面）学习DA的运作机制并计算其结果，但这种理解并不意味着理解策略防护性（通过专门设计的测试衡量）。然而，一种新颖的策略防护性菜单描述方式在传达这一属性方面显著优于其他处理方式。虽然行为效应平均较小，但策略防护性理解水平超过特定阈值的参与者以非常高的比率采用经典占优策略。
33020.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C78, C91, D47, D91

33019.title: The Impact of the Chinese Exclusion Act on the Economic Development of the Western U.S.
33019.zh_title: 《排华法案》对美国西部经济发展的影响
33019.authors: Joe Long, Carlo Medici, Nancy Qian, Marco Tabellini
33019.abstract: This paper investigates the economic consequences of the 1882 Chinese Exclusion Act, which banned immigration from China to the United States. The Act reduced the number of Chinese workers of all skill levels residing in the U.S. It also reduced the labor supply and the quality of jobs held by white and U.S.-born workers, the intended beneficiaries of the Act, and reduced manufacturing output. The results suggest that the Chinese Exclusion Act slowed economic growth in western states until at least 1940.
33019.zh_abstract: 本文研究了1882年《排华法案》的经济后果，该法案禁止从中国移民到美国。该法案减少了居住在美国的各技能水平华工的数量。它还减少了该法案预期受益者——白人和美国本土工人的劳动力供给和就业质量，并降低了制造业产出。结果表明，《排华法案》至少到1940年为止减缓了西部各州的经济增长。

33018.title: Misperceptions and Demand for Democracy under Authoritarianism
33018.zh_title: 威权主义下的误解与民主需求
33018.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Cevat Giray Aksoy, Ceren Baysan, Carlos Molina, Gamze Zeki
33018.abstract: This paper investigates whether enduring authoritarian regimes are in part rooted in the population’s misperceptions about their social and economic costs—as opposed to a general preference for authoritarianism. We explore this question using online and field experiments in the context of Türkiye’s May 2023 presidential and parliamentary elections. We confirm that voters, especially those supporting the incumbent authoritarian government systematically underestimate both the extent to which democracy and media freedom have been eroded in Türkiye’ and their usefulness in dealing with natural disasters and corruption (two salient issues in Türkiye). We find that providing (accurate) information about the state and implications of democracy and media freedom have significant effects on beliefs and increase the likelihood of voting for the opposition by about 3.7 percentage points (6.2 percent) in the online experiment. In the field experiment, the ballot-box level opposition vote share in neighborhoods receiving the information treatment increases by 0.8 percentage point (1.5 percent). Interestingly, both in the field and online, the results are driven not by further mobilizing opposition supporters, but by influencing those likely to vote for the governing coalition and those holding more misperceived beliefs about democracy and media freedom in Türkiye. The evidence suggests that at least part of the support for authoritarian regimes may be coming from misperceptions about their institutions and policies, and may be more malleable than typically presumed.
33018.zh_abstract: 本文研究持久的威权政权是否部分根植于民众对其社会和经济成本的误解——而非对威权主义的普遍偏好。我们利用土耳其2023年5月总统和议会选举的背景，通过在线和实地实验探讨这一问题。我们证实，选民，尤其是支持现任威权政府的选民，系统性地低估了土耳其民主和媒体自由被侵蚀的程度，以及它们在应对自然灾害和腐败（土耳其的两个突出问题）方面的作用。我们发现，提供关于民主和媒体自由状况及其影响的（准确）信息，对信念有显著影响，并在在线实验中将投票给反对党的可能性提高了约3.7个百分点（6.2%）。在实地实验中，接受信息处理的社区中，投票箱层面的反对党得票率增加了0.8个百分点（1.5%）。有趣的是，无论是在实地还是在线实验中，结果并非通过进一步动员反对派支持者驱动，而是通过影响那些可能投票给执政联盟的人以及那些对土耳其民主和媒体自由持有更多误解信念的人。证据表明，对威权政权的支持至少部分可能源于对其制度和政策的误解，并且可能比通常假设的更具可塑性。

33017.title: Online Business Models, Digital Ads, and User Welfare
33017.zh_title: 在线商业模式、数字广告与用户福利
33017.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Daniel Huttenlocher, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius
33017.abstract: We present a model where social media platforms offer plans that intermix entertaining content with digital advertising (“ads”). Users derive utility from entertainment and learn about their valuation for a product from ads. While some users are fully rational, others naïvely perceive digital ads as more informative than they actually are. We characterize the profit-maximizing business model of the platform and show that welfare is lower when the platform monetizes through advertising instead of subscription both for naïfs (because they are targeted by intense digital advertising, which makes them over-optimistic about product quality and over-purchase the product) and for sophisticates (because the inflated demand from naïfs increases the firm’s price). This negative welfare effect is intensified when the platform can offer mixed business models that separate the naïve and sophisticated users into different plans. Our results are robust to firm-level and platform-level competition, because digital ads soften competition between both firms and platforms. We also show how digital ad taxes can improve welfare.
33017.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，其中社交媒体平台提供混合娱乐内容与数字广告（“广告”）的方案。用户从娱乐中获得效用，并通过广告了解他们对产品的估值。虽然一些用户是完全理性的，但其他用户天真地认为数字广告比实际更具信息性。我们刻画了平台利润最大化的商业模式，并表明当平台通过广告而非订阅实现盈利时，福利更低：对于天真型用户（因为他们被密集的数字广告所针对，这使他们对产品质量过度乐观并过度购买产品）和精明型用户（因为天真型用户膨胀的需求提高了企业价格）都是如此。当平台可以提供混合商业模式，将天真型和精明型用户分离到不同方案时，这种负面福利效应会加剧。我们的结果在企业层面和平台层面的竞争中都是稳健的，因为数字广告软化了企业和平台之间的竞争。我们还展示了数字广告税如何能够改善福利。
33017.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：D43, D83, L13

33016.title: Pitfalls of Demographic Forecasts of US Elections
33016.zh_title: 美国选举人口统计预测的陷阱
33016.authors: Richard Calvo, Vincent Pons, Jesse M. Shapiro
33016.abstract: Many influential observers have forecast large partisan shifts in the US electorate based on demographic trends. Such forecasts are appealing because demographic trends are often predictable even over long horizons. We backtest demographic forecasts using data on US elections since 1952. We envision a forecaster who fits a model using data from a given election and uses that model, in tandem with a projection of demographic trends, to predict future elections. Even a forecaster with perfect knowledge of future demographic trends would have performed poorly over this period—worse even than one who simply guesses that each election will have a 50-50 partisan split. Enriching the set of demographics available does not change this conclusion. Slow demographic change, unstable group preferences, and strategic party responses all help to explain why demography has not been destiny in US politics.
33016.zh_abstract: 许多有影响力的观察家基于人口趋势预测了美国选民群体的重大党派转变。这类预测很有吸引力，因为即使是在长期内，人口趋势也常常是可预测的。我们使用1952年以来美国选举的数据对人口统计预测进行了回溯测试。我们设想一位预测者，他使用某次选举的数据拟合一个模型，并利用该模型结合人口趋势预测来预测未来选举。即使是一位对未来人口趋势有完美了解的预测者，在这一时期的表现也会很差——甚至比简单猜测每次选举党派分裂为50-50的预测者还要差。丰富可用的人口统计变量集并不能改变这一结论。缓慢的人口变化、不稳定的群体偏好以及政党的战略回应，都有助于解释为什么人口统计在美国政治中并非宿命。

33015.title: The Impact of Intergenerational Transfers on the Distribution of Wealth: An International Comparison
33015.zh_title: 代际转移对财富分配的影响：一项国际比较
33015.abstract: In this paper, I analyze detailed data on intergenerational transfers in 4 countries (China, India, Japan, and the United States) from the “Japan Household Panel Survey on Consumer Preferences and Satisfaction (JHPS-CPS)” which has been conducted by the Institute of Social and Economic Research of Osaka University in these 4 countries since 2003, in order to shed light on the impact of intergenerational transfers on household wealth disparities and on possible reasons for the substantial differences in household wealth disparities among the 4 countries. Almost all of the evidence I present suggests that intergenerational transfers have a disequalizing impact on household wealth disparities and promote the transmission of household wealth disparities from generation to generation in all 4 countries although the magnitude of these effects varies considerably from country to country. Moreover, the evidence I present sheds considerable light on possible reasons for the substantial differences in household wealth disparities among the 4 countries.
33015.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我分析了来自“日本家庭面板调查关于消费者偏好与满意度（JHPS-CPS）”的四个国家（中国、印度、日本和美国）的代际转移详细数据，该调查由大阪大学社会经济研究所自2003年起在这四个国家进行，旨在揭示代际转移对家庭财富差距的影响，以及这四个国家家庭财富差距巨大差异的可能原因。我提出的几乎所有证据都表明，在所有四个国家中，代际转移对家庭财富差距具有不平等化影响，并促进了家庭财富差距的代际传递，尽管这些效应的程度因国家而异。此外，我提出的证据为这四个国家家庭财富差距巨大差异的可能原因提供了相当多的启示。
33015.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D12, D31, D64, E21, E24, J16

33014.title: The Causal Effects of Inflation Uncertainty on Households' Beliefs and Actions
33014.zh_title: 通胀不确定性与家庭信念及行为的因果效应
33014.authors: Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion, Geoff Kenny
33014.abstract: We implement a survey-based randomized information treatment that generates independent variation in the inflation expectations and the uncertainty about future inflation of European households. This variation allows us to assess how both first and second moments of inflation expectations separately affect subsequent household decisions. We document several key findings. First, higher inflation uncertainty leads households to reduce their subsequent durable goods purchases for several months, while a higher expected level of inflation increases them. Second, an increase in uncertainty about inflation induces households to tilt their portfolios towards safe and away from riskier asset holdings. Third, higher inflation uncertainty encourages household job search, leading to higher subsequent employment among the unemployed and less under-employment among the employed. Finally, we document that the level of inflation expectations has a different effect from uncertainty in inflation expectations and thus it is crucial to take into account both to measure their separate effects on decisions.
33014.zh_abstract: 我们实施了一项基于调查的随机信息处理实验，该实验在欧洲家庭中独立地产生了通胀预期和未来通胀不确定性的变化。这种变化使我们能够分别评估通胀预期的一阶矩和二阶矩如何影响随后的家庭决策。我们记录了若干关键发现。首先，更高的通胀不确定性导致家庭在未来几个月减少耐用品购买，而更高的预期通胀水平则会增加耐用品购买。其次，通胀不确定性的增加促使家庭将其投资组合从风险资产转向安全资产。第三，更高的通胀不确定性鼓励家庭求职，从而提高了失业者随后的就业率，并减少了在职者的就业不足。最后，我们记录到通胀预期水平与通胀预期不确定性具有不同的影响，因此，在衡量它们对决策的各自影响时，同时考虑两者至关重要。
33014.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, LS, ME；JEL：C83, D84, E31, G51

33013.title: Dynamically Optimized Sequential Experimentation (DOSE) for Estimating Economic Preference Parameters
33013.zh_title: 动态优化序贯实验法（DOSE）用于估计经济偏好参数
33013.authors: Jonathan Chapman, Erik Snowberg, Stephanie W. Wang, Colin Camerer
33013.abstract: We introduce DOSE—Dynamically Optimized Sequential Experimentation—to elicit preference parameters. DOSE starts with a model of preferences and a prior over the parameters of that model, then dynamically chooses a customized question sequence for each participant according to an experimenter-selected information criterion. After each question, the prior is updated, and the posterior is used to select the next, informationally-optimal, question. Simulations show that DOSE produces parameter estimates that are approximately twice as accurate as those from established elicitation methods. DOSE estimates of individual-level risk and time preferences are also more accurate, more stable over time, and faster to administer in a large representative, incentivized survey of the U.S. population (N = 2,000). By reducing measurement error, DOSE identifies a stronger relationship between risk aversion and cognitive ability than other elicitation techniques. DOSE thus provides a flexible procedure that facilitates the collection of incentivized preference measures in the field.
33013.zh_abstract: 我们引入了DOSE——动态优化序贯实验法——来引出偏好参数。DOSE从一个偏好模型和该模型参数的先验分布开始，然后根据实验者选择的信息准则，动态地为每位参与者选择定制的问题序列。在每个问题之后，先验分布被更新，后验分布被用于选择下一个信息最优的问题。模拟显示，DOSE产生的参数估计精度大约是传统引出方法的两倍。在一个具有代表性的、有激励的美国人口大规模调查（N=2000）中，DOSE对个体层面风险和时间偏好的估计也更准确、随时间更稳定，且管理速度更快。通过减少测量误差，DOSE识别出风险厌恶与认知能力之间的关系比其他引出技术更强。因此，DOSE提供了一种灵活的程序，有助于在现场收集有激励的偏好度量。
33013.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：C81, C9, D03, D81, D9

33055.title: Slack and Economic Development
33055.authors: Michael W. Walker, Nachiket Shah, Edward Miguel, Dennis Egger, Felix Samy Soliman, Tilman Graff
33055.abstract: Slack – the underutilization of factors of production – varies systematically with economic development. Using novel and detailed measures of the utilization of labor and capital from a large representative sample of firms in rural and urban Kenya, we show that utilization is increasing in firm size, market access, and economic activity. We present a model of firm capacity choice where indivisibility in at least one input is a key driver of slack. We embed the model in spatial general equilibrium, with features characteristic of low-income settings – including many small firms and high transport costs – and show that it rationalizes both the endogenous emergence of slack in steady-state and elastic aggregate supply curves. We empirically validate model predictions using reduced-form estimates of the general equilibrium effects of cash transfers from a large-scale RCT in Kenya. The parsimonious model replicates much of the experimental evidence, predicting a large real multiplier of 1.5, driven by expansion in low-utilization sectors and firms, and limited average price inflation. Counterfactual analyses indicate that multipliers are likely to be meaningfully smaller in lower slack settings, such as urban areas. We use the model to revisit the estimation of spatial spillovers in clustered RCTs and uncover non-trivial ’missing intercept’ effects on income and inflation. Additionally, we innovate methodologically by pre-registering key elements of model estimation and validation. The findings suggest that input indivisibilities and slack are key features of developing country settings, and are quantitatively important for macroeconomic dynamics and policies.
33055.zh_abstract: 闲置——生产要素的利用不足——随经济发展水平而系统性地变化。利用来自肯尼亚农村和城市地区大型代表性企业样本中关于劳动力和资本利用的新颖且详细的衡量指标，我们表明利用率随企业规模、市场准入和经济活动的增加而提高。我们提出了一个企业产能选择模型，其中至少一种投入的不可分割性是闲置的关键驱动因素。我们将该模型嵌入空间一般均衡中，并加入了低收入环境的典型特征——包括大量小企业和高昂的运输成本——并表明该模型既能解释稳态下闲置的内生出现，也能解释弹性总供给曲线。我们利用肯尼亚一项大规模随机对照试验中现金转移的一般均衡效应的简化式估计，对模型预测进行了实证验证。这个简约模型在很大程度上复现了实验证据，预测出1.5的巨大实际乘数，该乘数由低利用率部门和企业的扩张驱动，而平均价格通胀有限。反事实分析表明，在闲置程度较低的环境（如城市地区），乘数可能会显著变小。我们利用该模型重新审视了整群随机对照试验中空间溢出效应的估计，并发现了对收入和通胀的非平凡的“缺失截距”效应。此外，我们在方法论上进行了创新，预先注册了模型估计和验证的关键要素。研究结果表明，投入不可分割性和闲置是发展中国家环境的关键特征，并对宏观经济动态和政策具有重要的定量意义。

33054.title: Digital Distractions with Peer Influence: The Impact of Mobile App Usage on Academic and Labor Market Outcomes
33054.zh_title: 同伴影响下的数字干扰：手机应用使用对学业和劳动力市场结果的影响
33054.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Siyu Chen, Chao Fu, Teng Li
33054.abstract: Concerns about excessive mobile phone use among youth are mounting. We present, to our knowledge, the first estimates of both behavioral and contextual peer effects, along with comprehensive evidence on how students’ own and their peers’ app usage affect academic performance, physical health, and labor market outcomes. Our analysis draws on administrative data from a Chinese university covering three student cohorts over four years. We exploit random roommate assignments, an exogenous policy shock, and an exogenous event for identification. App usage is contagious: a one s.d. increase in roommates’ in-college app usage raises own usage by 5.8%. High app usage is harmful across all measured outcomes. A one s.d. increase in app usage reduces GPAs by 36.2% of a within-cohort-major s.d. and lowers wages by 2.3%. Roommates’ app usage reduces a student’s GPAs and wages through both disruptions and behavioral spillovers, generating a total negative effect that exceeds half the magnitude of the impact from the student’s own app usage. Extending China’s three-hour-per-week gaming restriction for minors to college students would boost their initial wages by 0.9%. High-frequency GPS and app usage data show that heavy app users spend less time in study halls, are more frequently late or absent from class, and get less sleep.
33054.zh_abstract: 关于年轻人过度使用手机的担忧日益加剧。我们首次提供了行为性和情境性同伴效应的估计，并全面展示了学生自身及同伴的应用使用如何影响学业表现、身体健康和劳动力市场结果。我们的分析基于一所中国大学跨越四年的三届学生行政数据。我们利用随机室友分配、外生政策冲击和外生事件进行识别。应用使用具有传染性：室友在校期间应用使用量每增加一个标准差，自身使用量增加5.8%。高应用使用对所有测量结果都有害。应用使用量每增加一个标准差，GPA降低同届专业标准差的36.2%，工资降低2.3%。室友的应用使用通过干扰和行为溢出降低学生的GPA和工资，产生的总负面效应超过学生自身应用使用影响幅度的一半。将中国对未成年人每周三小时游戏限制扩展到大学生，将使其初始工资提高0.9%。高频GPS和应用使用数据显示，重度应用使用者花在自习室的时间更少，上课迟到或旷课更频繁，睡眠也更少。
33054.meta: Programs：CH, ED, IO, LS, PE；JEL：D12, D90, E24, I23, L82, L86, Z13

33053.title: Bucky, Becky, and Student Financial Aid Policy Design
33053.zh_title: 巴基、贝基与学生助学金政策设计
33053.authors: Elise A. Marifian, Jeffrey A. Smith, Sarah Turner
33053.abstract: Bucky’s Tuition Promise (BTP) at the University of Wisconsin–Madison offers generous financial aid to low-income, in-state students. Unlike many similar programs at other public universities, financial eligibility for BTP depends solely on a family’s Adjusted Gross Income (AGI), rather than on the Expected Family Contribution (EFC) from the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) or some function of the poverty line. This program design aims to make eligibility simpler and more transparent for students and their families and thereby to encourage application and matriculation. We investigate the implications of the program design for who does and does not receive additional institutional aid, with a particular focus on the marginal group of BTP-eligible students who lack Federal Pell Grant eligibility. With this analysis, we aim to motivate a broader discussion of different notions of equity in financial aid administration and the tough tradeoffs implicit in simplifying eligibility criteria.
33053.zh_abstract: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校的“巴基学费承诺”（BTP）为低收入州内学生提供慷慨的助学金。与许多其他公立大学的类似项目不同，BTP的经济资格仅取决于家庭的调整后总收入（AGI），而非联邦学生援助免费申请（FAFSA）的预期家庭贡献（EFC）或贫困线的某种函数。该程序设计旨在使资格认定对学生及其家庭更简单、更透明，从而鼓励申请和入学。我们研究了该程序设计对谁获得或未获得额外机构援助的影响，特别关注那些符合BTP资格但缺乏联邦佩尔助学金资格的边际群体。通过这一分析，我们旨在推动更广泛的讨论，涉及助学金管理中不同公平概念以及简化资格标准所隐含的艰难权衡。

33052.title: Poverty, Hardship, and Government Transfers
33052.zh_title: 贫困、困难与政府转移支付
33052.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Jeehoon Han, James X. Sullivan
33052.abstract: We examine how the well-being of those with few resources changed, amidst economic disruption and large, transitory government transfers. We find that in the years leading up to the pandemic and in 2020, the patterns for income and consumption poverty were very similar. In 2021 and 2022, however, changes in income and consumption poverty were quite different—consumption poverty fell less than income poverty in 2021, and then income poverty rose sharply in 2022 while consumption poverty continued to decline. Reports of hardships rose in 2022 for both families with and without children, suggesting increased concern about financial well-being as COVID-era transfer programs expired. A key difference between income and consumption measures appears to be saving during the pandemic followed by dissaving, even among those near the poverty line. This finding indicates that permanent income models can even be relevant when low-income households, that typically have very limited saving, receive very large transitory payments. Unlike past academic studies and numerous politicians and pundits that have attributed most of the decline in income poverty in 2021, and its subsequent rise in 2022, to the Child Tax Credit, we show that expanded Unemployment Insurance and stimulus payments played a larger role.
33052.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在经济混乱和大规模临时政府转移支付的背景下，资源匮乏者的福祉如何变化。我们发现，在疫情前几年和2020年，收入贫困和消费贫困的模式非常相似。然而，在2021年和2022年，收入贫困和消费贫困的变化差异显著——2021年消费贫困的下降幅度小于收入贫困，随后2022年收入贫困急剧上升，而消费贫困继续下降。2022年，有子女和无子女家庭的困难报告均有所增加，表明随着新冠时期转移支付项目到期，对财务福祉的担忧加剧。收入与消费指标之间的一个关键差异似乎是疫情期间的储蓄行为以及随后的动用储蓄，即使在贫困线附近的人群中也是如此。这一发现表明，永久收入模型即使在低收入家庭（通常储蓄非常有限）收到大量临时支付时也可能适用。与过去的研究以及众多政治家和评论员将2021年收入贫困下降及其后2022年上升主要归因于儿童税收抵免不同，我们表明扩大的失业保险和刺激支付发挥了更大作用。
33052.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：E21, H23, H30, I38

33051.title: Long-Term Contracts, Commitment, and Optimal Information Disclosure
33051.zh_title: 长期合同、承诺与最优信息披露
33051.abstract: This paper studies optimal information disclosure in dynamic insurance economies with income risk in which an incumbent firm acquires more information about a consumer's persistent type than the rest of the market does. We find that if the incumbent can commit to long-term contracts but the consumer can walk away, the optimal disclosure prescribes no information revelation to maximize cross-subsidization. However, if the incumbent lacks commitment, no cross-subsidization of low-income consumers is feasible for any public information disclosure because of adverse selection. We show that partial information disclosure is typically optimal and it aims at implementing intertemporal consumption smoothing between the first period and the high-state in the second period, generating an inverse of the back-loading result in Harris and Holmstrom (1982). Lastly, we show that, without commitment, banning long-term relations can be beneficial to consumers. Our results can be used to analyze the consequences of policy proposals such as open banking and consumer data ownership.
33051.zh_abstract: 本文研究了存在收入风险的动态保险经济中的最优信息披露，其中现有企业比市场其他参与者获取更多关于消费者持久类型的信息。我们发现，如果现有企业可以承诺长期合同但消费者可以退出，最优披露规定不披露任何信息以最大化交叉补贴。然而，如果现有企业缺乏承诺，由于逆向选择，任何公开信息披露都无法实现对低收入消费者的交叉补贴。我们表明，部分信息披露通常是最优的，其目标是在第一期和第二期的高状态之间实现跨期消费平滑，产生与Harris和Holmstrom（1982）中后置结果相反的效果。最后，我们表明，在没有承诺的情况下，禁止长期关系可能对消费者有利。我们的结果可用于分析开放银行和消费者数据所有权等政策提案的后果。

33050.title: Income, Wealth, and Environmental Inequality in the United States
33050.zh_title: 美国的收入、财富与环境不平等
33050.authors: Jonathan M. Colmer, Suvy Qin, John L. Voorheis, Reed Walker
33050.abstract: This paper explores the relationships between air pollution, income, and wealth by combining data from U.S. tax returns between 1979–2016, various measures of air pollution, and sociodemographic information from linked survey and administrative data. In the first year of our data, the relationship between income and ambient pollution levels nationally is approximately zero. However, at every single percentile of the national income distribution, Black individuals are exposed to, on average, higher levels of air pollution than White individuals. By 2016, the relationship between income and air pollution had steepened, primarily for Black individuals, driven by changes in where rich and poor Black individuals live. We utilize quasi-random shocks to income to examine the causal effect of changes in income and wealth on pollution exposure over a five year horizon, finding that these income–pollution elasticities map closely to the values implied by our descriptive patterns. We calculate that Black-White differences in income can explain ∼10 percent of the observed racial gap in air pollution exposure in 2016.
33050.zh_abstract: 本文通过结合1979-2016年美国纳税申报数据、多种空气污染指标以及来自关联调查和行政数据的社会人口信息，探讨了空气污染、收入和财富之间的关系。在我们数据的第一年，全国范围内收入与环境污染物水平之间的关系近似为零。然而，在全国收入分布的每一个百分位，黑人个体平均暴露于比白人个体更高水平的空气污染。到2016年，收入与空气污染之间的关系变得更加陡峭，这主要针对黑人个体，且由富裕和贫困黑人个体居住地的变化驱动。我们利用准随机收入冲击来研究五年内收入和财富变化对污染暴露的因果效应，发现这些收入-污染弹性与我们描述性模式所暗示的值高度吻合。我们计算出，2016年黑人与白人之间的收入差异可以解释观察到的空气污染暴露种族差距的约10%。

33049.title: Financial Sophistication and Bank Market Power
33049.zh_title: 金融素养与银行市场势力
33049.abstract: We study the relation between bank funding costs and the financial sophistication of bank customers. In doing this, we make use of a natural experiment that allows us to identify banks that—either intentionally or unintentionally—price time deposits in a way that can result in financially-unsophisticated customers essentially being shortchanged. We find that these banks have significantly lower deposit funding costs. These results provide evidence that having financially-unsophisticated customers may provide banks with substantial market power and be an important component of the value of a bank's deposit franchise.
33049.zh_abstract: 我们研究了银行融资成本与银行客户金融素养之间的关系。为此，我们利用了一个自然实验，该实验使我们能够识别那些——无论有意还是无意——以可能导致金融素养不高的客户实质上被欺骗的方式定价定期存款的银行。我们发现这些银行的存款融资成本显著较低。这些结果提供了证据，表明拥有金融素养不高的客户可能为银行提供可观的市场势力，并且是银行存款特许经营权价值的重要组成部分。

33048.title: Platform Power Struggle: Spotify and the Major Record Labels
33048.zh_title: 平台权力斗争：Spotify与主要唱片公司
33048.authors: Luis Aguiar, Joel Waldfogel, Axel Zeijen
33048.abstract: Digitization has facilitated the emergence of large distribution platforms downstream from traditionally powerful suppliers. Digital platforms can carry many suppliers’ products, test the products’ consumer appeal, and choose which products to promote, potentially shifting power from the suppliers to the platforms. We study these forces in the recorded music industry, which was traditionally dominated by a few “major” record labels distributing their products through fragmented radio stations and retailers. Now, the majors receive most of their promotion and distribution through platforms like Spotify, which carry millions of songs from both major and “independent” suppliers. We study Spotify’s use of playlists using data covering 2017-2020. First, Spotify used their expanded playlist capacity to test – and discover – proportionately more independent songs to promote on their playlists. Second, at least relative to major-label playlists, Spotify-operated playlists promoted new independent songs more than was indicated by their subsequent success. Third, placement on Spotify new-music playlists has a large causal impact on streams. The independent-label share of new-music promotion rose from 38 percent in late 2017 to 55 percent in early 2020, which helps to explain the reported decline in the share of Spotify royalty payments to major-label suppliers over the same period.
33048.zh_abstract: 数字化促进了大型分销平台在传统上强大的供应商下游出现。数字平台可以承载许多供应商的产品，测试产品的消费者吸引力，并选择推广哪些产品，从而可能将权力从供应商转移到平台。我们在传统上由少数“主要”唱片公司通过分散的广播电台和零售商分销其产品主导的录制音乐行业中研究这些力量。现在，主要唱片公司通过像Spotify这样的平台获得大部分推广和分销，这些平台承载着来自主要和“独立”供应商的数百万首歌曲。我们利用2017-2020年的数据研究Spotify对播放列表的使用。首先，Spotify利用其扩大的播放列表容量来测试——并发现——更多独立歌曲以在其播放列表上推广。其次，至少相对于主要唱片公司的播放列表，Spotify运营的播放列表推广新独立歌曲的程度超过了其后续成功所表明的水平。第三，在Spotify新音乐播放列表上的位置对流媒体有巨大的因果影响。独立唱片公司在新音乐推广中的份额从2017年底的38%上升到2020年初的55%，这有助于解释同期报告的主要唱片公司供应商从Spotify获得的版税份额下降。

33047.title: Modeling Migration-Induced Unemployment
33047.abstract: Immigration is often blamed for increasing unemployment among local workers. However, standard models, such as the neoclassical model and the Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides matching model, inherently assume that immigrants are absorbed into the labor market without affecting local unemployment. This paper presents a more general model of migration that allows for the possibility that not only the wages but also the unemployment rate of local workers may be affected by the arrival of newcomers. This extension is essential to capture the full range of potential impacts of labor migration on labor markets. The model blends a matching framework with job rationing. In it, the arrival of new workers can raise the unemployment rate among local workers, particularly in a depressed labor market where job opportunities are limited. On the positive side, in-migration helps firms fill vacancies more easily, boosting their profits. The overall impact of in-migration on local welfare varies with labor market conditions: in-migration reduces welfare when the labor market is inefficiently slack, but it enhances welfare when the labor market is inefficiently tight.
33047.zh_abstract: 移民常被指责增加了当地工人的失业率。然而，标准模型，如新古典模型和Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides匹配模型，内在地假设移民被劳动力市场吸收而不影响当地失业率。本文提出了一个更一般的移民模型，允许新移民的到来不仅可能影响当地工人的工资，还可能影响其失业率。这一扩展对于捕捉劳动力迁移对劳动力市场的潜在影响范围至关重要。该模型将匹配框架与工作配给相结合。在该模型中，新工人的到来可能提高当地工人的失业率，特别是在就业机会有限的萧条劳动力市场中。从积极方面看，迁入有助于企业更容易填补职位空缺，从而提高其利润。迁入对当地福利的总体影响随劳动力市场状况而变化：当劳动力市场效率低下且松弛时，迁入会降低福利；但当劳动力市场效率低下且紧张时，迁入则会提高福利。
33047.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, POL；JEL：E24, E32, J2, J6

33046.title: Health Insurance and Part-Time Employment: The Influence of the Affordable Care Act
33046.zh_title: 健康保险与兼职就业：《平价医疗法案》的影响
33046.authors: Katharine G. Abraham, Henry S. Farber
33046.abstract: Prior to the passage of the Affordable Care Act (ACA), part-time workers were much less likely than full-time workers to have health insurance. The ACA included multiple provisions intended to raise health insurance coverage rates, including a mandate that employers provide affordable coverage to full-time workers, a requirement that dependents be allowed to remain on their parents’ plan until age 26, extensions of Medicaid coverage, and the establishment of health insurance exchanges on which lower-income households could purchase subsidized coverage. Implementation of these provisions was associated with a decline in the full-time/part-time coverage gap from 6.5 percentage points in 2013 to 3.1 percentage points in 2021. Increases in Medicaid coverage and insurance purchased on the exchanges reduced were the largest contributors to the reduction in the full-time/part-time coverage gap.
33046.zh_abstract: 在《平价医疗法案》（ACA）通过之前，兼职工作者拥有健康保险的可能性远低于全职工作者。ACA包含多项旨在提高健康保险覆盖率的条款，包括要求雇主为全职工作者提供可负担的保险、允许受抚养人留在父母保单中直至26岁、扩大医疗补助覆盖范围，以及建立健康保险交易所，使低收入家庭能够购买有补贴的保险。这些条款的实施与全职/兼职保险覆盖差距的缩小相关，该差距从2013年的6.5个百分点降至2021年的3.1个百分点。医疗补助覆盖范围的扩大以及在交易所购买的保险的增加，是缩小全职/兼职保险覆盖差距的最大贡献因素。

33045.title: Transitional Market Dynamics in Complex Environments
33045.zh_title: 复杂环境中的转型市场动态
33045.authors: C. Lanier Benkard, Przemyslaw Jeziorski, Gabriel Weintraub
33045.abstract: This paper presents a new approach to modeling transitional dynamics in dynamic models of imperfect competition, a crucial yet often neglected aspect of empirical models in industrial organization that seek to understand market responses to policy and environmental changes. We introduce Nonstationary Oblivious Equilibrium (NOE), a computationally efficient equilibrium concept based on a mean-field approximation designed to model short- and medium-run market dynamics. Addressing potential limitations of NOE in more concentrated markets or under aggregate shocks, we propose a variant, NOE with Re-solving (RNOE). RNOE modifies firms' strategies by re-computing NOE as industry states get realized; an iterative process inspired by real-world industry practice that has behavioral appeal. We show the potential of NOE and RNOE by applying them to an empirical setting of technology adoption and to two classic dynamic oligopoly models, demonstrating that, in a wide variety of settings of empirical interest, they generate equilibrium behavior that is close to Markov perfect equilibrium in both the short and long runs.
33045.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种新方法来模拟不完全竞争动态模型中的转型动态，这是产业组织实证模型中一个关键但常被忽视的方面，这些模型旨在理解市场对政策和环境变化的反应。我们引入了非平稳无意识均衡（NOE），这是一种基于平均场近似的计算高效均衡概念，旨在模拟短期和中期市场动态。针对NOE在更集中市场或面临总体冲击时可能存在的局限性，我们提出了一种变体，即带重新求解的NOE（RNOE）。RNOE通过随着行业状态实现而重新计算NOE来修改企业策略；这是一个受现实行业实践启发的迭代过程，具有行为吸引力。我们通过将NOE和RNOE应用于一个技术采纳的实证环境以及两个经典动态寡头模型，展示了它们的潜力，证明在多种具有实证兴趣的环境中，它们在短期和长期内都能产生接近马尔可夫完美均衡的均衡行为。

33044.title: Unconventional Policy and Inflation
33044.zh_title: 非常规政策与通货膨胀
33044.authors: Jing Cynthia Wu, Yinxi Xie, Ji Zhang
33044.abstract: We study the effects of unconventional monetary and fiscal policies on inflation dynamics. Using multiple complementary empirical approaches, including event studies, vector autoregressions, and regional panel regressions, we find little evidence that these policies contributed meaningfully to inflation in the past decades. The key economic mechanism operates through a disinflationary supply-side channel in the Phillips curve, which offsets the upward pressure on inflation from the usual demand channel. We demonstrate this mechanism both theoretically and empirically.
33044.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非常规货币和财政政策对通胀动态的影响。通过使用多种互补的实证方法，包括事件研究、向量自回归和区域面板回归，我们发现几乎没有证据表明这些政策在过去几十年中对通胀产生了显著影响。关键的经济机制通过菲利普斯曲线中的通缩供给侧渠道运作，该渠道抵消了通常需求渠道带来的通胀上行压力。我们从理论和实证两方面论证了这一机制。

33043.title: Industrial Policy: Lessons from Shipbuilding
33043.zh_title: 产业政策：来自造船业的教训
33043.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Myrto Kalouptsidi, Nahim B. Zahur
33043.abstract: Industrial policy has been used throughout history in some form or other by most countries. Yet, it remains one of the most contentious issues among policymakers and economists alike. In part, this is because the empirical evidence on whether and how it should be implemented remains slim. Scant data on government subsidies, conflicting theoretical arguments, and the need to account for governments’ short and long-run objectives, render research particularly challenging.
