In this article, we outline a theory-based empirical methodology that relies on estimating an industry equilibrium model to measure hidden subsidies, assess their welfare consequences for the domestic and global economy, as well as evaluate the effectiveness of different policy designs. We illustrate this approach using the global shipbuilding industry as a prototypical example of an industry targeted by industrial policy, especially in periods of heavy industrialization. Just in the past century, Europe, followed by Japan, then South Korea, and more recently China, developed national shipbuilding programs to propel their firms to global leaders. Success has been mixed across programs, certainly by welfare metrics, and sometimes even by growth metrics. We use our methodology on China to dissect the impact of such programs, what made them more or less successful, and how we can justify why governments have chosen shipbuilding as a target.
33043.zh_abstract: 产业政策在历史上以某种形式被大多数国家使用。然而，它仍然是政策制定者和经济学家之间最具争议的问题之一。部分原因是关于是否以及如何实施产业政策的实证证据仍然很少。政府补贴数据匮乏、理论观点相互矛盾，以及需要考虑政府的短期和长期目标，使得研究尤其具有挑战性。在本文中，我们概述了一种基于理论的实证方法，该方法依赖于估计行业均衡模型来衡量隐性补贴，评估其对国内和全球经济的福利后果，以及评估不同政策设计的有效性。我们以全球造船业作为产业政策目标行业的典型例子来说明这种方法，特别是在重工业化时期。仅在过去一个世纪，欧洲、日本、韩国以及最近的中国，都制定了国家造船计划，以推动其企业成为全球领导者。从福利指标来看，各计划的成功程度参差不齐，有时甚至从增长指标来看也是如此。我们使用我们的方法对中国进行分析，以剖析此类计划的影响，分析哪些因素使其或多或少成功，以及我们如何解释政府为何选择造船业作为目标。

33042.title: Job Search, Wages, and Inflation
33042.abstract: How do inflation expectations affect the job search behavior of workers when wages are set in nominal terms? A canonical job search model incorporating nominal wage rigidities implies that on-the-job search should increase with expected inflation. In a novel survey, we show that workers are more likely to search at higher values of hypothetical inflation. In the Survey of Consumer Expectations, within-respondent variation in inflation expectations predicts search. A back-of-the envelope calculation suggests the search mechanism and the 2021-2023 rise in inflation expectations can explain roughly 30 percent of the change in the job-to-job transition probability over that period.
33042.zh_abstract: 当工资以名义值设定时，通胀预期如何影响工人的求职行为？一个包含名义工资刚性的经典求职模型表明，在职求职应随预期通胀而增加。在一项新颖的调查中，我们显示工人在假设通胀值较高时更有可能进行求职。在消费者预期调查中，受访者内部通胀预期的变化可以预测求职行为。一个粗略估算表明，求职机制以及2021-2023年通胀预期的上升，可以解释该时期工作转换概率变化的大约30%。

33041.title: Why Didn't the U.S. Unemployment Rate Rise at the End of WWII?
33041.zh_title: 为什么二战结束时美国失业率没有上升？
33041.authors: Shigeru Fujita, Valerie A. Ramey, Tal Roded
33041.abstract: This paper investigates why the U.S. unemployment rate rose only a few percentage points despite the dramatic decline in government spending and other upheaval at the end of World War II. Using a new longitudinal data set based on archival sources and government surveys, we study the many facets of this question. We find five main results. First, withdrawals from the labor force at the end of WWII were an important part of the explanation for the small rise in the unemployment rate. These withdrawals tended to be concentrated among females between the ages of 20 and 44 and male war veterans. Second, among those staying in the labor force, most of the workers who separated from their jobs moved directly into a new job. Third, workers accomplished these job-to-job transitions despite moving across industries. Fourth, returning veterans quickly returned to their previous position on the occupation ladder whereas those laid off from civilian jobs experienced a significant step down the occupation ladder. Fifth, a neoclassical model suggests that the post-war boom in job creation was a direct consequence of the crowding out of investment in consumer durable goods, residential capital, and business capital by military spending during the war.
33041.zh_abstract: 本文研究了为什么尽管二战结束时政府支出急剧下降和其他动荡，美国失业率仅上升了几个百分点。利用基于档案资料和政府调查的新纵向数据集，我们研究了这一问题的多个方面。我们发现了五个主要结果。首先，二战结束时退出劳动力市场是失业率小幅上升解释的重要组成部分。这些退出主要集中在20至44岁的女性和男性退伍军人中。其次，在留在劳动力市场的人中，大多数离职的工人直接进入了新工作。第三，工人们尽管跨行业流动，但仍完成了这些工作转换。第四，返乡退伍军人迅速恢复到他们在职业阶梯上的先前位置，而从平民岗位被解雇的人则经历了职业阶梯的显著下降。第五，一个新古典模型表明，战后的就业创造繁荣是战争期间军事支出挤出了对耐用消费品、住宅资本和商业资本投资的直接结果。
33041.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG；JEL：E22, E32, E37, E62, N10, N42

33040.title: New Evidence on the Economics of Climate and Conflict
33040.zh_title: 关于气候与冲突经济学的新证据
33040.authors: Marshall Burke, Joel Ferguson, Solomon M. Hsiang, Edward Miguel
33040.abstract: We survey the quantitative research literature linking climate and conflict, a body of research that spans multiple academic disciplines and has roughly doubled in size in the last decade. It makes three main contributions. First, we carry out a meta-analysis – updating Hsiang et al (2013) and Burke et al (2015) with a far larger sample – and confirm that extreme climate is associated with elevated risk of inter-group conflict, intra-personal violence, and self-harm. The estimated average effects are smaller than the earlier estimates, although they remain meaningful in magnitude and highly statistically significant. Second, we present a methodological discussion and empirical illustration of how the use of data at different spatial and temporal scales can affect these results. Third, we discuss specific studies that present evidence on the mechanisms underlying this relationship including: (1) economic conditions, income, and agricultural productivity; (2) socio-demographic factors; (3) migration and transportation costs; (4) policy, politics and institutions; and (5) psychological and physiological factors. The chapter concludes with a discussion of policy implications and some open questions.
33040.zh_abstract: 我们调查了将气候与冲突联系起来的定量研究文献，这一研究领域跨越多个学科，在过去十年中规模大约翻了一番。本文做出三项主要贡献。首先，我们进行了一项元分析——用更大的样本更新了Hsiang等人（2013）和Burke等人（2015）的研究——并确认极端气候与群体间冲突、人际暴力和自伤风险升高相关。估计的平均效应小于先前的估计，尽管它们在幅度上仍然有意义且高度统计显著。其次，我们提出了一个方法论讨论和实证说明，展示了在不同空间和时间尺度上使用数据如何影响这些结果。第三，我们讨论了提供关于这种关系背后机制证据的具体研究，包括：（1）经济状况、收入和农业生产力；（2）社会人口因素；（3）移民和交通成本；（4）政策、政治和制度；以及（5）心理和生理因素。本章最后讨论了政策含义和一些未解决的问题。

33039.title: Early-Life Local Labor Market Conditions and Old-Age Male Mortality: Evidence from Deindustrialization of New England Textile Sector
33039.zh_title: 早期生活的地方劳动力市场条件与老年男性死亡率：来自新英格兰纺织业去工业化的证据
33039.abstract: Previous studies document the potential links between early-life exposures and life-cycle outcomes. However, fewer studies examine the effects of local labor market shocks during early-life on old-age male mortality. This article empirically investigates this link using a large-scale deindustrialization as a source of shocks to local labor markets: the decline in New England’s textile industry during the 1920s and 1930s. Consistent with prior studies, we find small impacts on migration and changes in sociodemographic composition of counties post-deindustrialization. Using Social Security Administration death records linked with historical censuses 1900-1940 and difference-in-difference event studies, we find reductions in longevity for those born in highly-exposed counties whose families are categorized as non-migrants and those residing in non-urban areas. The results suggest intent-to-treat effects of about 3.6 months while the treatment-on-treated calculations suggest reductions of about 4.2 years in longevity of children of affected families. Using 1950-1960 census data, we find that those born in highly-exposed counties post-deindustrialization reveal large reductions in schooling, decreases in high school completion, and significant decreases in measures of socioeconomic standing. We further discuss the policy implications of these findings.
33039.zh_abstract: 先前的研究记录了早期生活暴露与生命周期结果之间的潜在联系。然而，较少有研究考察早期生活中的地方劳动力市场冲击对老年男性死亡率的影响。本文利用大规模去工业化作为地方劳动力市场冲击的来源——即1920年代和1930年代新英格兰纺织业的衰退——对此关联进行了实证研究。与先前研究一致，我们发现去工业化后对移民和县社会人口构成变化的影响较小。利用与社会保障管理局死亡记录相关联的1900-1940年历史人口普查数据以及双重差分事件研究，我们发现，对于出生在高暴露县且其家庭被归类为非移民以及居住在农村地区的人，其寿命有所缩短。结果表明，意向性治疗效应约为3.6个月，而处理组平均处理效应的计算表明，受影响家庭子女的寿命减少了约4.2年。利用1950-1960年人口普查数据，我们发现，去工业化后出生在高暴露县的人，其受教育年限大幅减少，高中毕业率下降，社会经济地位指标显著降低。我们进一步讨论了这些发现的政策含义。
33039.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, EH, LS；JEL：I1, I15, J1, N30

33070.title: The Statistical Limit of Arbitrage
33070.authors: Rui Da, Stefan Nagel, Dacheng Xiu
33070.abstract: We investigate the economic consequences of statistical learning for arbitrage pricing in a high-dimensional setting. Arbitrageurs learn about alphas from historical data. When alphas are weak and rare, estimation errors hinder arbitrageurs—even those employing optimal machine learning techniques—from fully exploiting all true pricing errors. This statistical limit to arbitrage widens the equilibrium bounds of alphas beyond what traditional arbitrage pricing theory predicts, leading to a significant divergence between the feasible Sharpe ratio achievable by arbitrageurs and the unattainable theoretical maximum under perfect knowledge of alphas.
33070.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在高维环境下统计学习对套利定价的经济后果。套利者从历史数据中学习阿尔法。当阿尔法既弱又罕见时，估计误差会阻碍套利者——即使他们采用最优的机器学习技术——无法充分利用所有真实的定价错误。这种套利的统计极限将阿尔法的均衡边界扩大到超出传统套利定价理论预测的范围，导致套利者实际可实现的夏普比率与在完全了解阿尔法情况下无法达到的理论最大值之间存在显著差距。

33069.title: Retirement Incentives and Decisions across the Income Distribution: Evidence in Canada
33069.zh_title: 退休激励与决策在收入分配中的差异：来自加拿大的证据
33069.abstract: We evaluate the retirement incentives embedded in Canada’s retirement income system with attention to where individuals are located in the income distribution. We find that larger social security benefits are available to individuals with lower earnings in their work history because of the benefit income tests, but those from the top of the income distribution tend to enjoy longer lives over which they may receive benefits. Overall, we see greater Social Security Wealth among individuals from lower deciles. The implicit tax rates on continued work tend to be higher for workers from lower-earning deciles. Considering changes to actuarial adjustments associated with early pension take up, these implicit tax rates on work at older ages fell substantially after 2011. Our regression estimates confirm the importance of incentives on retirement behavior, with substantially larger effects for individuals in lower deciles. These effects are greater for women than men. In simulations, we show that changes to the actuarial adjustment had some impact on retirement rates by lowering the implicit tax on work. The overall redistributive effect of these induced retirement changes was fairly small, however, as the actuarial adjustments brought the system closer to actuarial fairness.
33069.zh_abstract: 我们评估了加拿大退休收入体系中蕴含的退休激励，并关注个人在收入分配中所处的位置。我们发现，由于福利收入测试的存在，工作历史中收入较低的个人可以获得更高的社会保障福利，但来自收入分配顶层的个人往往寿命更长，从而可能更长时间地领取福利。总体而言，我们看到较低收入十分位人群的社会保障财富更高。对于来自较低收入十分位的工人，继续工作的隐含税率往往更高。考虑到与提前领取养老金相关的精算调整变化，2011年后，老年工作的隐含税率大幅下降。我们的回归估计证实了激励对退休行为的重要性，且对较低收入十分位人群的影响显著更大。这些影响对女性大于男性。在模拟中，我们表明，精算调整的变化通过降低工作的隐含税率对退休率产生了一定影响。然而，这些由退休变化引起的总体再分配效应相当小，因为精算调整使系统更接近精算公平。

33068.title: How Do Electoral Votes, Presidential Approval, and Consumer Sentiment Respond to Economic Indicators?
33068.zh_title: 经济指标如何影响选举人票、总统支持率和消费者情绪？
33068.abstract: This paper studies the effect of economic indicators on the Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index, Presidential approval ratings, and Presidential election outcomes since 1956. How closely do the indicators predict sentiment, how well does sentiment predict approval, and what role does approval have in explaining election outcomes measured by electoral votes? How much of the variance of approval ratings depends on non-economic factors like the “honeymoon effect”? Is there a role for economic indicators in explaining election outcomes once the contribution of approval ratings is taken into account? Regression equations provide answers to these questions and allow new interpretations of political history. Equation residuals and the contributions of specific variables are graphically displayed, providing insights into time intervals when sentiment was above or below the prediction of economic indicators, when approval differed from its usual relation with sentiment and the indicators, and when and why the electoral vote totals in each election since 1956 exceeded or fell short of the predictions of the econometric equations.
33068.zh_abstract: 本文研究了自1956年以来经济指标对密歇根消费者情绪指数、总统支持率和总统选举结果的影响。这些指标在多大程度上预测了情绪？情绪在多大程度上预测了支持率？支持率在解释以选举人票衡量的选举结果中扮演了什么角色？支持率的变化中有多少取决于非经济因素，比如“蜜月效应”？在考虑支持率的贡献后，经济指标在解释选举结果中是否仍有作用？回归方程为这些问题提供了答案，并允许对政治历史进行新的解读。方程残差和特定变量的贡献以图形方式展示，提供了对以下时间区间的洞察：情绪高于或低于经济指标预测的时期；支持率偏离其与情绪和指标通常关系的时期；以及自1956年以来每次选举中选举人票总数超出或低于计量经济方程预测的时间和原因。

33067.title: Information Externalities, Free Riding, and Optimal Exploration in the UK Oil Industry
33067.zh_title: 信息外部性、搭便车与英国石油行业的最优勘探
33067.abstract: Information spillovers between firms can reduce R&D incentives if competitors can free ride on innovations. However, strong property rights may impede cumulative research and lead to inefficient duplication. These effects are particularly relevant in natural resource exploration, where discoveries are spatially correlated. Using UK offshore oil exploration data, I estimate a dynamic model that captures the trade-off between drilling now and waiting to learn from competitors. Removing free-riding incentives increases industry surplus by 52%, while perfect information flow raises it by 24%. Counterfactual policy simulations highlight a trade-off in property rights design: stronger property rights over exploration well data increase the rate of exploration, while weaker property rights increase the efficiency and speed of learning but reduce the rate of exploration. Spatial clustering of each firm's drilling licenses both reduces the incentive to free ride and increases the speed of learning.
33067.zh_abstract: 企业间的信息溢出会降低研发激励，如果竞争对手可以免费搭车利用创新成果。然而，强大的产权可能会阻碍累积性研究并导致低效的重复。这些效应在自然资源勘探中尤为相关，因为发现具有空间相关性。利用英国海上石油勘探数据，我估计了一个动态模型，该模型捕捉了立即钻探与等待从竞争对手那里学习之间的权衡。消除搭便车激励可使行业剩余增加52%，而完美的信息流动则使其增加24%。反事实政策模拟凸显了产权设计中的权衡：对勘探井数据更强的产权会提高勘探率，而较弱的产权会提高学习的效率和速度，但会降低勘探率。每个公司钻井许可证的空间聚集既减少了搭便车的激励，也提高了学习速度。

33066.title: The Time of Your Life: The Mortality and Longevity of Canadians
33066.zh_title: 你生命中的时光：加拿大人的死亡率与长寿
33066.abstract: I develop and implement a methodology for cohort life expectancy using a panel of administrative tax data on a large sample born between 1930 and 1964. Over these 35 years, cohort life expectancy after age 54 grew by 5 years for women and 7 years for men. The income-longevity gradient for the top vs. bottom five percent of incomes is 9 years of post-54 life for men and 7 years for women. The life expectancy improvements arise across the income distribution in Canada, unlike the United States. Large differences across neighbourhoods emerge which cannot be explained by income differences alone.
33066.zh_abstract: 我利用一个大型行政税收数据面板，针对1930年至1964年间出生的样本，开发并实施了一种队列预期寿命的测算方法。在这35年间，54岁后的队列预期寿命女性增长了5年，男性增长了7年。收入最高5%与最低5%人群之间的收入-长寿梯度，男性为54岁后寿命相差9年，女性为7年。与美国的趋势不同，加拿大的预期寿命改善发生在整个收入分配中。不同社区之间出现了巨大差异，这些差异无法仅用收入差异来解释。

33065.title: Overcoming Discrimination: Harassment and Discrimination Dynamics
33065.zh_title: 克服歧视：骚扰与歧视的动态机制
33065.authors: Yi Chen, Adam Dearing, Michael Waldman
33065.abstract: A common feature of historical episodes in which integration was successful, as well as episodes where integration was unsuccessful, is the aggravated harassment of the early pathbreakers who put themselves at risk by violating the previous segregated norm. Examples abound including Jackie Robinson and Larry Doby in the case of Major League Baseball, Autherine Lucy who was the first Black student at the University of Alabama, and Jane Chastain and Melissa Ludtke who were early female sports reporters. In this paper, we explore from a theoretical perspective the role of harassment of what we refer to as integration pathbreakers in the success and speed with which integration occurs. In our model of labor market discrimination, harassment occurs because the harassers receive direct and immediate utility from harassing, but also because harassment has the potential to slow down or even stop integration. Our main result is that such a setting can exhibit path dependence, where the success or failure of the early integration pathbreakers can be pivotal for the success and speed of the subsequent integration process. That is, early success is more likely to be followed by successful and faster integration than early failure, even when the early success is not due to aspects of the environment that make integration easier. In addition to our formal theoretical analysis of the role of harassment in the success and speed of integration, we apply our results to various historical episodes.
33065.zh_abstract: 在成功融合的历史事件以及融合失败的事件中，一个共同特征是早期开拓者遭受了加剧的骚扰，这些人通过违反先前的隔离规范而将自己置于风险之中。例子比比皆是，包括美国职业棒球大联盟中的杰基·罗宾逊和拉里·多比、阿拉巴马大学第一位黑人学生奥瑟琳·露西，以及早期女性体育记者简·查斯坦和梅丽莎·卢德克。在本文中，我们从理论角度探讨了骚扰——我们称之为融合开拓者——在融合成功与否及速度中的作用。在我们的劳动力市场歧视模型中，骚扰之所以发生，是因为骚扰者从骚扰行为中获得直接和即时的效用，同时也因为骚扰有可能减缓甚至阻止融合。我们的主要结果是，这种设定可能表现出路径依赖，早期融合开拓者的成功或失败可能对后续融合过程的成功和速度起到关键作用。也就是说，早期成功更有可能带来成功和更快的融合，而早期失败则相反，即使早期成功并非由于使融合更容易的环境因素所致。除了对骚扰在融合成功和速度中作用的正式理论分析外，我们还将我们的结果应用于各种历史事件。

33064.title: Generation and Impact of Novel Articles in Physics
33064.zh_title: 物理学中新颖论文的产生与影响
33064.authors: Jacques Mairesse, Michele Pezzoni, Frederique Sachwald
33064.abstract: The aim of this paper is twofold. First, it investigates how the characteristics of a research team relate to the probability of generating a novel article. Second, once a novel article has been generated, it investigates the moderating effects of the team's characteristics on the impact of the article. We consider 42,493 teams of researchers publishing a corresponding number of articles in 273 reputed journals in physics from 2005 to 2009. We find that team experience and team specialization are negatively associated with the probability of generating a novel article. On the contrary, having already written novel articles in the past is positively associated with the probability of generating a novel article. When analyzing the impact of novel articles, we find that a novel article published by an experienced team receives fewer citations than a novel article published by a team with less experience and is published in a lower impact factor journal. We also find that a novel article published by a large established team of researchers receives more citations than a novel article published by a small newly formed team. The team size is also positively related to the impact factor of the journal in which the novel article is published.
33064.zh_abstract: 本文的目的有两个。首先，它研究了研究团队的特征与产生新颖论文概率之间的关系。其次，一旦新颖论文产生，它研究了团队特征对论文影响的调节效应。我们考虑了2005年至2009年间在273种知名物理学期刊上发表相应数量论文的42493个研究团队。我们发现，团队经验和团队专业化与产生新颖论文的概率呈负相关。相反，过去曾撰写过新颖论文与产生新颖论文的概率呈正相关。在分析新颖论文的影响时，我们发现，由经验丰富的团队发表的新颖论文获得的引用次数少于由经验较少的团队发表的新颖论文，并且发表在影响因子较低的期刊上。我们还发现，由大型成熟研究团队发表的新颖论文获得的引用次数多于由小型新组建团队发表的新颖论文。团队规模也与发表新颖论文的期刊影响因子呈正相关。

33063.title: Inequality in Science: Who Becomes a Star?
33063.zh_title: 科学中的不平等：谁会成为明星？
33063.abstract: How does a person’s childhood socioeconomic status (SES) influence their chances to participate and succeed in science? To investigate this question, we use machine-learning methods to link scientists in a comprehensive biographical dictionary, the American Men of Science (1921), with their childhood home in the US Census and with publications. First, we show that children from low-SES homes were already severely underrepresented in the early 1900s. Second, we find that SES influences peer recognition, even conditional on participation: Scientists from high-SES families have 38% higher odds of becoming stars, controlling for age, publications, and disciplines. Using live-in servants as an alternative measure for SES confirms the strong link between childhood SES and becoming a star. Applying text analysis to assign scientists to disciplines, we find that mathematics is the only discipline in which SES influences stardom through the number and the quality of a scientist’s publications. Using detailed data on job titles to distinguish academic from industry scientists, we find that industry scientists have lower odds of being stars. Controlling for industry employment further strengthens the link between childhood SES and stardom. Elite undergraduate degrees explain more of the correlation between SES and stardom than any other control. At the same time, controls for birth order, family size, foreign-born parents, maternal education, patents, and connections with existing stars leave estimates unchanged, highlighting the importance of SES.
33063.zh_abstract: 一个人的童年社会经济地位如何影响其参与科学并取得成功的几率？为探究这一问题，我们运用机器学习方法，将一部综合性传记辞典《美国科学界人士》（1921年）中的科学家与其在美国人口普查中的童年家庭住址及出版物进行关联。首先，我们发现，早在20世纪初，来自低社会经济地位家庭的儿童就已经严重缺乏代表性。其次，我们发现，即使控制了参与科学活动这一条件，社会经济地位仍会影响同行认可：在控制了年龄、出版物和学科后，来自高社会经济地位家庭的科学家成为明星的几率高出38%。使用家中有住家佣人作为社会经济地位的替代指标，进一步证实了童年社会经济地位与成为明星之间的强关联。通过文本分析将科学家分配到不同学科，我们发现数学是唯一一个社会经济地位通过科学家出版物的数量和质量影响其明星地位的学科。利用详细的职位头衔数据区分学术界与产业界科学家，我们发现产业界科学家成为明星的几率较低。控制产业就业因素后，童年社会经济地位与明星地位之间的关联进一步增强。与其他任何控制变量相比，精英大学本科学位更能解释社会经济地位与明星地位之间的相关性。同时，控制出生顺序、家庭规模、父母是否外国出生、母亲教育程度、专利以及与现有明星的联系等变量后，估计值保持不变，这凸显了社会经济地位的重要性。
33063.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PR；JEL：J24, N0, N32, O3

33062.title: Feeding the Tigers: Remittances and Conflict in Sri Lanka
33062.zh_title: 喂养猛虎：斯里兰卡的侨汇与冲突
33062.authors: Barthélémy Bonadio, Andrei A. Levchenko, Dominic Rohner, Mathias Thoenig
33062.abstract: This paper estimates and quantifies the impact of the diaspora remittance flows on the conflict intensity and outcomes in the Sri Lankan Civil War during the period 1996-2009. We develop an approach to infer which remittance inflows were likely to benefit the Tamil Tiger rebels relative to the central government based on Facebook connections data at the subnational level. Using shocks to source country remittance outflows, we show that exogenous increases in remittances accessible to the Tamil Tigers significantly increased their fighting strength. We then set up a quantitative model of two-sided armed conflict over many contested geographic locations, augmented with remittance flows that affect the fighting strengths of the two sides. We structurally estimate the key parameters using remittance and conflict data, and calibrate the model to the Sri Lankan subdistricts over the period of the conflict. Our main quantitative finding is that remittances had a significant impact on the timing of the central government victory, and were a substantially more important component of the military strength of the Tamil Tigers than of the government. Remittances that favored the Tamil Tiger rebels may have prolonged the war by as much as 14 years.
33062.zh_abstract: 本文估计并量化了1996-2009年斯里兰卡内战期间，海外侨汇流动对冲突强度和结果的影响。我们开发了一种方法，基于次国家级层面的Facebook连接数据，推断哪些侨汇流入可能更有利于泰米尔猛虎组织而非中央政府。利用来源国侨汇流出的冲击，我们表明，泰米尔猛虎组织可获取的侨汇外生增加显著增强了其战斗力。随后，我们建立了一个涉及多个争议地理位置的双方武装冲突定量模型，并加入了影响双方战斗力的侨汇流。我们利用侨汇和冲突数据对关键参数进行结构估计，并将模型校准至冲突期间斯里兰卡的次行政区。我们的主要定量发现是，侨汇对中央政府获胜的时机产生了显著影响，并且侨汇作为泰米尔猛虎组织军事力量的一个组成部分，其重要性远高于对政府军而言。有利于泰米尔猛虎组织叛军的侨汇可能将战争延长了长达14年。

33061.title: Labor Market Anatomy of a Macroeconomic Crisis
33061.zh_title: 宏观经济危机的劳动力市场剖析
33061.authors: Kevin Donovan, Will Jianyu Lu, Joseph H. Pedtke, Todd Schoellman
33061.abstract: This paper uses two large datasets built from quarterly labor force surveys to provide a global perspective on labor market downturns. The distribution of the severity and duration of labor market downturns is strongly right skewed. The longest and most severe downturns are associated with crises, particularly financial crises, sudden stops, and house price busts. Manufacturing and construction are key sectors for propagation, as they account for more than half of the total decline in employment. Labor market downturns fall most on young and less-educated workers, who are less able to self-insure against idiosyncratic earnings risk.
33061.zh_abstract: 本文利用基于季度劳动力调查构建的两个大型数据集，提供了劳动力市场衰退的全球视角。劳动力市场衰退的严重程度和持续时间的分布呈强烈右偏态。持续时间最长、最严重的衰退与危机相关，特别是金融危机、资本流入骤停和房价暴跌。制造业和建筑业是传导的关键部门，它们占就业总下降量的一半以上。劳动力市场衰退对年轻和受教育程度较低的工人影响最大，这些工人更难以自我保险来应对特殊的收入风险。

33060.title: Estimating Peer Effects among College Students: Evidence from a Field Experiment of One-to-One Pairings in STEM
33060.zh_title: 估计大学生中的同伴效应：来自STEM领域一对一配对田野实验的证据
33060.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Daniel M. Oliver, Glenn Millhauser, Randa Roland
33060.abstract: An extensive literature in the social sciences analyzes peer effects among students, but estimation is complicated by several major problems some of which cannot be solved even with random assignment. We design a field experiment and propose a new estimation technique to address these estimation problems including the mechanical problems associated with repeated observations within peer groups noted by Angrist (2014). The field experiment randomly assigns students to one-to-one partnerships in an important gateway STEM course at a large public university. We find no evidence of peer effects from estimates of exogenous peer effect models. We push further and estimate outcome-on-outcome models which sometimes reveal peer effects when exogenous models do not provide good proxies for ability. We find some limited evidence of small, positive outcome-on-outcome peer effects (which would have been missed without our new estimation technique). Standard estimation methods fail to detect peer effects and even return negative estimates in our Monte Carlo simulations because of the downward bias due to mechanical problems. Simulations reveal additional advantages of our technique especially when peer group sizes are fixed. Estimates of non-linear effects, heterogeneous effects, and different measures of peer ability and outcomes reveal mostly null effects but we find some evidence that low-ability peers negatively affect low-ability and medium-ability students. The findings in this setting of long-term, intensive interactions with classroom random assignment and “throwing everything at it” provide evidence of, at most, small positive peer effects contrasting with the common finding of large peer effects in previous studies in education.
33060.zh_abstract: 社会科学中大量文献分析了学生间的同伴效应，但由于几个主要问题，估计变得复杂，其中一些问题即使通过随机分配也无法解决。我们设计了一项田野实验，并提出了一种新的估计技术来解决这些估计问题，包括Angrist（2014）指出的与同伴群体内重复观察相关的机械性问题。该田野实验在一所大型公立大学一门重要的STEM入门课程中，将学生随机分配到一对一的学习伙伴关系中。从外生同伴效应模型的估计中，我们没有发现同伴效应的证据。我们进一步推进，估计了结果对结果模型，这些模型有时在外生模型无法提供良好能力代理变量时揭示了同伴效应。我们发现了有限证据表明存在微小、正向的结果对结果同伴效应（如果没有我们的新估计技术，这些效应会被遗漏）。标准估计方法未能检测到同伴效应，甚至在我们的蒙特卡洛模拟中由于机械性问题导致的向下偏误而返回负估计值。模拟揭示了我们技术的额外优势，尤其是在同伴群体规模固定时。对非线性效应、异质性效应以及同伴能力和结果的不同衡量指标的估计，大多显示为零效应，但我们发现一些证据表明，低能力同伴对低能力和中等能力学生产生负面影响。在这个具有课堂随机分配和“倾尽所有”方法的长期、密集互动环境中，研究结果提供了最多存在微小正向同伴效应的证据，这与以往教育研究中普遍发现的大规模同伴效应形成对比。

33059.title: How Do Income-Driven Repayment Plans Benefit Student Debt Borrowers?
33059.zh_title: 收入驱动还款计划如何惠及学生贷款借款人？
33059.authors: Sylvain Catherine, Mehran Ebrahimian, Constantine Yannelis
33059.abstract: Using credit bureau data, we show that nearly half the increase in student debt since 2010 is due to deferred payments and the expansion of income-driven repayment (IDR) plans. These plans help borrowers smooth consumption, insure income risk, and reduce the effective debt cost. Using a life-cycle model, we quantify the welfare gains from this payment deferment and the channels through which welfare increases. New, more generous rules further subsidize borrowers without yielding net welfare gains. We show that an optimally calibrated plan can achieve similar welfare gains at a much lower cost to taxpayers, and without encouraging additional borrowing.
33059.zh_abstract: 利用征信局数据，我们表明自2010年以来学生债务增长中近一半是由于延期还款和收入驱动还款计划的扩张。这些计划帮助借款人平滑消费、为收入风险提供保险，并降低有效债务成本。通过使用生命周期模型，我们量化了这种还款延期带来的福利收益以及福利增加的渠道。新的、更慷慨的规则进一步补贴了借款人，但并未产生净福利收益。我们表明，一个经过最优校准的计划可以在不鼓励额外借贷的情况下，以低得多的纳税人成本实现类似的福利收益。
33059.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ED, LS, PE；JEL：G50, H52, I20

33058.title: Optimal Dynamic Asset Allocation with Transaction Costs: The Role of Hedging Demands
33058.zh_title: 存在交易成本时的最优动态资产配置：对冲需求的作用
33058.authors: Pierre Collin-Dufresne, Kent D. Daniel, Mehmet Sağlam
33058.abstract: A number of papers have solved for the optimal dynamic portfolio strategy when expected returns are time-varying and trading is costly, but only for agents with myopic utility. Non-myopic agents benefit from hedging against future shocks to the investment opportunity set even when transaction costs are zero (Merton, 1969, 1971). In this paper, we propose a solution to the dynamic portfolio allocation problem for non-myopic agents faced with a stochastic investment opportunity set when trading is costly. We show that the agent’s optimal policy is to trade toward an “aim” portfolio, the makeup of which depends both on transaction costs and on each asset’s correlation with changes in the investment opportunity set. The speed at which the agent should trade towards the aim portfolio depends both on the shock’s persistence and on the extent to which the shock can be effectively hedged. We illustrate the differences in portfolio makeup that result from considering hedging demands of a long-horizon investor using a set of simplified examples, and using a daily trading strategy based on the estimated relation between retail order imbalance and future returns.
33058.zh_abstract: 许多论文已经解决了当预期收益率随时间变化且交易有成本时的最优动态投资组合策略问题，但仅针对具有短视效用的代理人。即使交易成本为零，非短视代理人也能从对冲未来投资机会集冲击中获益（Merton, 1969, 1971）。在本文中，我们为面临随机投资机会集且交易有成本的非短视代理人，提出了动态投资组合配置问题的解决方案。我们表明，代理人的最优策略是向一个“目标”投资组合进行交易，该投资组合的构成既取决于交易成本，也取决于每个资产与投资机会集变化的相关性。代理人向目标投资组合交易的速度，既取决于冲击的持续性，也取决于该冲击能被有效对冲的程度。我们通过一组简化示例，以及基于零售订单不平衡与未来收益率之间估计关系的日度交易策略，说明了考虑长期投资者对冲需求所导致的投资组合构成差异。

33057.title: The Impact of United States Assimilation and Allotment Policy on American Indian Mortality
33057.zh_title: 美国同化与土地分配政策对美国印第安人死亡率的影响
33057.authors: Grant Miller, Jack Shane, C. Matthew Snipp
33057.abstract: In contrast to earlier United States policies of open war, forcible removal, and relocation to address the “Indian Problem,” the Dawes Act of 1887 focused on assimilation and land severalty—making American Indians citizens of the United States with individually-titled plots of land rather than members of collective tribes with communal land. Considerable scholarship shows that the consequences of the policy differed substantially from its stated goals, and by the time of its repeal in 1934, American Indians had lost two-thirds of all native land held in 1887 (86 million acres)—and nearly two-thirds of American Indians had become landless or unable to meet subsistence needs. Complementing rich qualitative history, this paper provides new quantitative evidence on the impact of the Dawes Act on mortality among American Indian children and adults. Using 1900 and 1910 U.S. population census data to study both household and tribe-level variation in allotment timing, we find that assimilation and allotment policy increased the American Indian child mortality ratio by a little more than 15%. In secondary analyses (requiring additional assumptions) focused on total mortality, we find increases among young American Indians of nearly one-third (implying a decline in life expectancy at birth of about 20%). These results confirm contemporary critics’ adamant concerns about the Dawes Act.
33057.zh_abstract: 与早期美国为解决“印第安人问题”而采取的公开战争、强制迁移和重新安置政策不同，1887年的《道斯法案》侧重于同化和土地私有化——使美国印第安人成为拥有个人土地所有权的美国公民，而非拥有公共土地的集体部落成员。大量学术研究表明，该政策的后果与其既定目标大相径庭，到1934年该法案被废除时，美国印第安人已失去了1887年所持所有原住民土地的三分之二（8600万英亩）——近三分之二的美国印第安人变得无地或无法满足生存需求。作为对丰富定性历史的补充，本文提供了关于《道斯法案》对美国印第安儿童和成人死亡率影响的新定量证据。利用1900年和1910年美国人口普查数据，研究家庭和部落层面在土地分配时间上的差异，我们发现，同化与土地分配政策使美国印第安儿童死亡率比率增加了略高于15%。在针对总死亡率的二次分析（需要额外假设）中，我们发现年轻美国印第安人的死亡率增加了近三分之一（意味着出生时预期寿命下降了约20%）。这些结果证实了当时批评者对《道斯法案》的强烈担忧。
33057.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH；JEL：I14, I15, I18, J15, N31

33095.title: Revisiting the Phillips and Beveridge Curves: Insights from the 2020s Inflation Surge
33095.zh_title: 重新审视菲利普斯曲线和贝弗里奇曲线：来自2020年代通胀飙升的启示
33095.abstract: This paper reexamines the Phillips and Beveridge curves to explain the inflation surge in the U.S. during the 2020s. We argue that the pre-surge consensus regarding both curves requires substantial revision. We propose that the Inverse-L (INV-L) New Keynesian Phillips Curve replace the standard New Keynesian Phillips Curve. The INV-L curve is piecewise-linear and more sensitive to labor market conditions when it crosses the Beveridge threshold — a point at which the labor market becomes excessively tight and enters a "labor shortage" regime. We introduce a modified Beveridge curve that features a near-vertical slope once the Beveridge threshold is passed, suggesting that in this region, adjustment in labor market tightness occurs almost exclusively through a drop in vacancies rather than an increase in unemployment. This feature matches the U.S. experience since the Federal Reserve's tightening cycle began in March 2022. We also observe a similar pattern in the data during five other inflation surges over the past 111 years where the Beveridge threshold was breached. We define a Beveridge-threshold (BT) unemployment rate. Once unemployment falls below this rate, policymakers must be alert to sharp inflationary pressures from demand or supply shocks. We explore several policy implications.
33095.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视了菲利普斯曲线和贝弗里奇曲线，以解释2020年代美国通胀的飙升。我们认为，在通胀飙升前关于这两条曲线的共识需要大幅修正。我们提出用倒L型新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线替代标准的新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线。倒L型曲线是分段线性的，并且当它越过贝弗里奇阈值（即劳动力市场变得过于紧张并进入“劳动力短缺”状态的点）时，对劳动力市场状况更为敏感。我们引入了一条修正的贝弗里奇曲线，其特征是一旦越过贝弗里奇阈值，曲线斜率近乎垂直，这表明在该区域内，劳动力市场紧张程度的调整几乎完全通过职位空缺的下降而非失业率的上升来实现。这一特征与美联储自2022年3月开始紧缩周期以来美国的经验相符。我们还观察到，在过去111年中，其他五次通胀飙升期间的数据也呈现出类似模式，当时贝弗里奇阈值均被突破。我们定义了一个贝弗里奇阈值失业率。一旦失业率低于这一水平，政策制定者必须警惕来自需求或供给冲击的急剧通胀压力。我们探讨了若干政策含义。
33095.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E0, E30, E40, E42, E44, E47, E49, E5, E51, E58, J20, J39

33094.title: Marine Microplastics and Infant Health
33094.zh_title: 海洋微塑料与婴儿健康
33094.authors: Xinming Du, Shan Zhang, Eric Zou
33094.abstract: A century of plastic usage has led to an accumulation of plastic waste in waterways and oceans. Over time, these wastes break down into particles smaller than 5 microns – or “microplastics” – which can infiltrate human biological systems. Despite decades of research into this emerging source of environmental pollution, there is a lack of direct evidence on the health impacts of microplastics exposure at a population scale. This paper reports the first causal link between in-utero microplastic exposure and adverse birth outcomes. Our analysis is based on a compiled dataset of 3 million births that occurred in coastal areas of 15 countries spanning four continents, which we merge with a novel remote-sensing measurement of marine microplastic concentrations. We show that in-utero exposure to microplastics, particularly during the third trimester of pregnancy, leads to a significant increase in the likelihood of low birth weight. A doubling of exposure increases low birth weight hazard by 0.37 per 1,000 births, which implies over 205,000 cases per year globally can be attributed to microplastic exposure. We further show that aerosolization – whereby microplastic particles become airborne and inhalable due to seawater evaporation – is an important pathway for health impact, a challenge that is likely to escalate as ocean temperatures continue to rise.
33094.zh_abstract: 一个世纪的塑料使用导致塑料废物在水道和海洋中积累。随着时间的推移，这些废物分解成小于5微米的颗粒——即“微塑料”——它们可以渗入人体生物系统。尽管对这种新兴环境污染源的研究已有数十年，但缺乏关于微塑料暴露在人口规模上对健康影响的直接证据。本文报告了子宫内微塑料暴露与不良出生结果之间的首个因果联系。我们的分析基于一个汇编数据集，该数据集包含来自横跨四大洲15个国家沿海地区的300万例出生记录，我们将其与一种新颖的海洋微塑料浓度遥感测量数据相结合。我们表明，子宫内微塑料暴露，尤其是在妊娠晚期，会导致低出生体重概率显著增加。暴露量每增加一倍，每1000例出生中低出生体重的风险增加0.37例，这意味着全球每年有超过20.5万例低出生体重病例可归因于微塑料暴露。我们进一步表明，气溶胶化——即微塑料颗粒因海水蒸发而悬浮于空气中并被吸入——是健康影响的一个重要途径，随着海洋温度持续上升，这一挑战可能会加剧。
33094.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH；JEL：I18, O13, Q25, Q53

33093.title: Peer Influence on West Point Cadets’ CivilWar Allegiances
33093.zh_title: 同伴影响对西点军校学员内战效忠选择的作用
33093.authors: Yuchen Guo, Matthew O. Jackson, Ruixue Jia
33093.abstract: Do social networks and peer influence shape major life decisions in highly polarized settings? We explore this question by examining how peers influenced the allegiances of West Point cadets during the American Civil War. Leveraging quasi-random variations in the proportion of cadets from Free States, we analyze how cadets’ decisions about which army to join depended on the composition of their peers. We have three main findings. First, there was a strong and significant peer effect: a higher proportion of classmates from Free States significantly increased the likelihood that cadets from Slave States joined the Union Army. Second, the peer effect varies with geography, most notably with the slave population share in cadets’ home states or counties, and with cadets’ own slave ownership in 1860. Third, peer effects were amplified by shared experiences such as having served together in the Mexican-American War, continuous military service, and belonging to the same cohort, suggesting that sustained interaction is important.
33093.zh_abstract: 社会网络和同伴影响是否会在高度两极化的环境中塑造重大人生决策？我们通过考察美国内战期间同伴如何影响西点军校学员的效忠选择来探讨这一问题。利用来自自由州学员比例的准随机变化，我们分析了学员决定加入哪支军队如何受其同伴构成的影响。我们有三个主要发现。首先，存在强烈且显著的同伴效应：来自自由州的同学比例越高，显著增加了来自蓄奴州的学员加入联邦军的可能性。其次，同伴效应随地理因素而变化，最显著的是学员家乡州或县的奴隶人口比例，以及学员自身在1860年的奴隶拥有情况。第三，共同经历（如曾一起在美墨战争中服役、持续服役以及属于同一届学员）会放大同伴效应，这表明持续的互动至关重要。
33093.meta: Programs：DAE, PE, POL；JEL：D81, D85, I28, N31, N41

33092.title: How Big is the “Biggest Climate Spending Bill Ever?” Key Factors Influencing the Inflation Reduction Act’s Clean Energy Impacts
33092.zh_title: “史上最大气候支出法案”有多大？影响《通胀削减法案》清洁能源效果的关键因素
33092.abstract: The Inflation Reduction Act could deliver more than $\$1$ trillion in tax expenditures and outlays targeting clean energy deployment, but considerable uncertainty characterizes the economic, emissions, energy, and fiscal implications of the law. I review the features of the political system governing implementation, the regulatory system overlaying performance standards, the innovation responding to IRA incentives, and the energy networks in which IRA-supported investments operate to identify the key factors influencing IRA’s outcomes. Drawing from past research and policy experience, I illustrate how these factors could play out and how future program evaluation could reduce uncertainty and inform better climate policy.
33092.zh_abstract: 《通胀削减法案》可能提供超过1万亿美元的税收支出和拨款，用于清洁能源部署，但该法案的经济、排放、能源和财政影响存在相当大的不确定性。我回顾了实施该法案的政治体系特征、叠加绩效标准的监管体系、响应《通胀削减法案》激励措施的创新，以及《通胀削减法案》支持的投资所运行的能源网络，以识别影响该法案结果的关键因素。借鉴过去的研究和政策经验，我阐述了这些因素可能如何发挥作用，以及未来的项目评估如何能够减少不确定性并为更好的气候政策提供信息。

33091.title: Empirical Bayes Methods in Labor Economics
33091.zh_title: 劳动经济学中的经验贝叶斯方法
33091.abstract: Labor economists increasingly work in empirical contexts with large numbers of unit-specific parameters. These settings include a growing number of value-added studies measuring causal effects of individual units like firms, managers, neighborhoods, teachers, schools, doctors, hospitals, police officers, and judges. Empirical Bayes (EB) methods provide a powerful toolkit for value-added analysis. The EB approach leverages distributional information from the full population of units to refine predictions of value-added for each individual, leading to improved estimators and decision rules. This chapter offers an overview of EB methods in labor economics, focusing on properties that make EB useful for value-added studies and practical guidance for EB implementation. Applications to school value-added in Boston and employer-level discrimination in the US labor market illustrate the EB toolkit in action.
33091.zh_abstract: 劳动经济学家越来越多地在具有大量单位特定参数的实证背景下工作。这些背景包括越来越多的增值研究，用于衡量企业、管理者、社区、教师、学校、医生、医院、警察和法官等个体单位的因果效应。经验贝叶斯方法为增值分析提供了一个强大的工具包。经验贝叶斯方法利用来自全部单位总体的分布信息来细化对每个个体增值的预测，从而产生改进的估计量和决策规则。本章概述了劳动经济学中的经验贝叶斯方法，重点关注使经验贝叶斯方法对增值研究有用的特性，以及实施经验贝叶斯方法的实用指南。对波士顿学校增值和美国劳动力市场雇主歧视的应用展示了经验贝叶斯工具包的实际应用。
33091.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C10, C11, I21, J01, J7

33090.title: Physician Practice Preferences and Healthcare Expenditures: Evidence from Commercial Payers
33090.zh_title: 医生执业偏好与医疗支出：来自商业保险支付方的证据
33090.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Pierre-Thomas Léger, Yashna Nandan, Robert Town
33090.abstract: We examine the relationship between physician preferences and both the intensity and cost of care delivered to commercially insured heart attack patients. We match survey data on physician preferences, collected by Cutler, Skinner, Stern, and Wennberg (2019) (CSSW), to medical claims data from the Health Care Cost Institute, which spans over 50 million insurance beneficiaries. In contrast to CSSW, who find strong correlations between aggressive practice preferences and both expenditure and utilization for the Medicare population, we find relationships that are both economically and statistically smaller in magnitude within the commercially insured population. Variations in commercial insurers’ prices appear to play an important mediating role.
33090.zh_abstract: 我们考察了医生偏好与商业保险心脏病发作患者所接受医疗服务的强度及成本之间的关系。我们将Cutler, Skinner, Stern和Wennberg (2019)收集的医生偏好调查数据与健康成本研究所的医疗索赔数据（涵盖超过5000万保险受益人）进行匹配。与CSSW发现激进执业偏好与Medicare人群的支出和利用率之间存在强相关性相反，我们发现，在商业保险人群中，这种关系在经济和统计上的幅度都较小。商业保险公司价格的差异似乎起到了重要的中介作用。

33089.title: Welfare Effects of a Permanent Unconditional Cash Transfer Program: Evidence from Maricá, Brazil
33089.zh_title: 永久性无条件现金转移项目的福利效应：来自巴西马里卡的证据
33089.authors: Sidhya Balakrishnan, Roberta Costa, Johannes Haushofer, Fábio Waltenberg
33089.abstract: We investigate the impact of a permanent unconditional cash transfer called “Citizen’s Basic Income” in the city of Maricá, Brazil. At the time of the study, the program made monthly household-level transfers of USD 180 PPP on average to about a fourth of the city’s residents. The program is unique in that it is both unconditional and permanent, while existing programs typically only have one of these features. Between September 2021 and April 2022, we surveyed 5,182 individuals, about half of whom received the RBC. We use propensity score matching with inverse probability weights to create a matched comparison group and estimate the effect of the program on economic, social, and psychological outcomes. Our results reveal several positive welfare effects. Household income including transfers increased by 9%; consumption at the per capita level did not change significantly, but the household as a whole experienced a consumption increase of 5%. We also observe improvements in an index of children’s health and education, although the effect does not survive multiple inference correction and bounding. There was a notable displacement of other income sources, particularly labor income, which decreased by 17% among recipients, suggesting shifts to lower-paying but potentially more desirable jobs during the pandemic. The program also led to increased access to financial services, but decreased the propensity to save. These findings paint a nuanced picture of the socioeconomic benefits of unconditional cash transfers and established cash transfer administrative systems.
33089.zh_abstract: 我们调查了巴西马里卡市一项名为“公民基本收入”的永久性无条件现金转移项目的影响。在研究期间，该项目平均每月向该市约四分之一的居民提供按购买力平价计算180美元的家庭层面转移支付。该项目的独特之处在于它既是无条件的又是永久性的，而现有项目通常只具备其中一个特征。在2021年9月至2022年4月期间，我们调查了5182人，其中约一半是RBC的受益者。我们使用倾向得分匹配结合逆概率权重来创建匹配的比较组，并估计该项目对经济、社会和心理结果的影响。我们的结果揭示了若干积极的福利效应。包括转移支付在内的家庭收入增加了9%；人均消费水平没有显著变化，但整个家庭的消费增长了5%。我们还观察到儿童健康和教育指数的改善，尽管该效应在多重推断校正和边界分析中不显著。其他收入来源，特别是劳动收入，出现了显著替代，受益者的劳动收入下降了17%，这表明在疫情期间人们转向了收入较低但可能更理想的工作。该项目还导致金融服务可及性增加，但储蓄倾向下降。这些发现描绘了无条件现金转移及其建立的现金转移行政体系的社会经济收益的细致图景。

33088.title: Preferences, Selection, and the Structure of Teacher Pay
33088.zh_title: 偏好、选择与教师薪酬结构
33088.abstract: I examine teacher preferences using a discrete-choice experiment, which I link to administrative data on teacher effectiveness. I estimate willingness-to-pay for a rich set of compensation elements and working conditions. Highly effective teachers usually have the same preferences as their peers, but they have stronger preferences for performance pay. I use the preference estimates to investigate the optimal compensation structure for three key objectives: maximizing teacher utility, maximizing teacher retention, and maximizing student achievement. Under each objective, schools underutilize salary and performance pay, while overutilizing retirement benefits. Restructuring compensation can significantly improve both teacher welfare and student achievement.
33088.zh_abstract: 我使用离散选择实验来考察教师偏好，并将其与教师有效性的行政数据相关联。我估计了教师对一系列薪酬要素和工作条件的支付意愿。高效教师通常与同行具有相同的偏好，但他们更偏好绩效薪酬。我利用偏好估计来研究三个关键目标下的最优薪酬结构：最大化教师效用、最大化教师留任率以及最大化学生成绩。在每个目标下，学校都未能充分利用薪水和绩效薪酬，而过度使用了退休福利。重组薪酬结构可以显著改善教师福利和学生成绩。
33088.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：I20, J32, J45, M50

33087.title: Service Quality on Online Platforms: Empirical Evidence about Driving Quality at Uber
33087.zh_title: 在线平台的服务质量：来自优步驾驶质量的实证证据
33087.authors: Susan Athey, Juan Camilo Castillo, Bharat Chandar
33087.abstract: Online marketplaces have adopted new quality control mechanisms that can accommodate a flexible pool of providers. In the context of ride-hailing, we measure the effectiveness of these mechanisms, which include ratings, incentives, and behavioral nudges. Using telemetry data as an objective measure of quality, we find that drivers not only respond to user preferences but also improve their behavior after receiving warnings about their low ratings. Furthermore, we use data from a randomized experiment to show that informing drivers about their past behavior improves quality, especially for low-performing drivers. Lastly, we find that UberX drivers exhibit behavior comparable to that of UberTaxi drivers, suggesting that Uber’s new quality control mechanisms successfully maintain a high level of service quality.
33087.zh_abstract: 在线市场采用了新的质量控制机制，以适应灵活的服务提供者群体。在网约车背景下，我们衡量了这些机制的有效性，包括评分、激励和行为助推。使用遥测数据作为质量的客观衡量标准，我们发现司机不仅对用户偏好做出反应，而且在收到低评分警告后改善了自身行为。此外，我们利用随机实验的数据表明，告知司机其过去的行为可以提高质量，尤其是对于表现较差的司机。最后，我们发现UberX司机的行为与UberTaxi司机相当，这表明优步的新质量控制机制成功维持了高水平的服务质量。

33086.title: The Effects of a Statewide Ban on School Suspensions
33086.zh_title: 全州范围内禁止学校停课的影响
33086.authors: Jane Arnold Lincove, Catherine Mata, Kalena Cortes
33086.abstract: This research analyzes the implementation of a school suspension ban in Maryland to investigate whether a top-down state-initiated ban on suspensions in early primary grades can influence school behavior regarding school discipline. Beginning in the fall of 2017, the State of Maryland banned the use of out-of-school suspensions for grades PK-2, unless a student posed an “imminent threat” to staff or students. This research investigates (1) what was the effect of the ban on discipline outcomes for students in both treated grades and upper elementary grades not subject to the ban? (2) did schools bypass the ban by coding more events as threatening or increasing the use of in-school suspensions? and (3) were there differential effects for students in groups that are historically suspended more often? Using a comparative interrupted time series strategy, we find that the ban is associated with a substantial reduction in, but not a total elimination of, out-of-school suspensions for targeted grades without substitution of in-school suspensions. Disproportionalities by race and other characteristics remain after the ban. Grades not subject to the ban experienced few effects, suggesting the ban did not trigger a schoolwide response that reduced exclusionary discipline.
33086.zh_abstract: 本研究分析了马里兰州实施的学校停课禁令，以调查自上而下的州级禁令是否能在早期小学阶段影响学校在纪律方面的行为。自2017年秋季起，马里兰州禁止对学前班至二年级学生使用校外停课，除非该学生对教职员工或其他学生构成“迫在眉睫的威胁”。本研究探讨了：(1) 该禁令对受处理年级以及未受禁令约束的高年级小学学生的纪律结果有何影响？(2) 学校是否通过将更多事件归类为威胁或增加校内停课的使用来规避禁令？(3) 对于历史上更常被停课的学生群体，是否存在差异化效应？采用比较中断时间序列策略，我们发现该禁令与目标年级校外停课的大幅减少（但并非完全消除）相关，且未出现校内停课的替代现象。禁令实施后，按种族和其他特征划分的不成比例现象依然存在。未受禁令约束的年级几乎没有受到影响，这表明该禁令并未引发全校范围内减少排斥性纪律的反应。

33085.title: Distance to Opportunity: Higher Education Deserts and College Enrollment Choices
33085.zh_title: 通往机会的距离：高等教育荒漠与大学入学选择
33085.authors: Riley K. Acton, Kalena Cortes, Camila Morales
33085.abstract: We study how geographic access to public postsecondary institutions is associated with students’ college enrollment decisions across race and socioeconomic status. Leveraging rich administrative data, we first document substantial differences in students’ local college options, with White, Hispanic, and rural students having, on average, many fewer nearby options than their Black, Asian, suburban, and urban peers. We then show that students are sensitive to the distance they must travel to access public colleges and universities, but there are heterogeneous effects across students. In particular, we find that White and non-economically disadvantaged students respond to living far from public two-year colleges primarily by enrolling in four-year colleges, whereas Black, Hispanic, and economically disadvantaged students respond primarily by forgoing college enrollment altogether. Lastly, in a series of decomposition and simulation exercises to inform public policy efforts to increase college enrollment, especially among underrepresented minorities and low-income students, we find that differences in students’ sensitivity to distance, rather than differences in distance to the nearest college, primarily contribute to observed four-year college enrollment gaps across racial and ethnic groups.
33085.zh_abstract: 我们研究了地理上获得公立高等教育机构的可及性如何与不同种族和社会经济地位学生的大学入学决策相关联。利用丰富的行政数据，我们首先记录了学生在当地大学选择上的显著差异：白人、西班牙裔和农村学生平均而言比黑人、亚裔、郊区和城市学生拥有更少的就近选择。然后，我们表明学生对就读公立学院和大学所需通勤的距离很敏感，但不同学生之间存在异质性效应。具体而言，我们发现白人和非经济弱势学生主要通过就读四年制大学来应对远离公立两年制学院的情况，而黑人、西班牙裔和经济弱势学生则主要通过完全放弃大学入学来应对。最后，在一系列分解和模拟练习中，旨在为增加大学入学率（尤其是代表性不足的少数族裔和低收入学生）的公共政策努力提供信息，我们发现，学生距离敏感性的差异，而非与最近大学距离的差异，是导致不同种族和民族群体间四年制大学入学差距的主要原因。

33084.title: Firm Wage Effects
33084.abstract: This paper reviews the literature on firm wage differences and the fixed effects methods typically used to measure these differences. High wage firms tend to be more productive, larger, more sought after by workers, and to employ more credentialed and higher wage workers. The latest evidence suggests high wage firms also tend to offer better amenities and are prone to outsourcing and mass layoffs. Reviewing the requirements of the “AKM model” of Abowd, Kramarz, and Margolis (1999), I provide a graph theoretic interpretation of the restrictions this model places on the wage changes of workers who switch employers and examine the extent to which they are satisfied in a benchmark dataset. Assumptions are provided that give these wage changes a causal interpretation and I discuss some difficulties that arise in aggregating them into a global ranking of firm wage levels. In reviewing the econometrics of variance decompositions, I argue that attention ought to focus on effect sizes rather than variance shares, which can be difficult to compare across datasets with different noise levels. Cross-fitting and clustering methods for addressing limited mobility bias are reviewed. A series of bounding and imputation exercises suggest the network pruning typically used in conjunction with cross-fitting methods has little effect on estimands of interest. A review of the latest international evidence finds that the bias-corrected standard deviation of firm effects tends to be substantially elevated in less developed countries. Variance estimation methods for second step regressions of firm effects on covariates are reviewed and illustrated with an empirical application to the firm size wage premium. Finally, I discuss connections between the AKM model and the celebrated sequential auction framework of Postel-Vinay and Robin (2002a), concluding with some areas for future work at this intersection.
33084.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于企业工资差异以及通常用于衡量这些差异的固定效应方法的文献。高工资企业往往生产率更高、规模更大、更受工人青睐，并且雇佣更多拥有资质和更高工资的工人。最新证据表明，高工资企业也倾向于提供更好的工作条件，并且容易出现外包和大规模裁员。在回顾Abowd、Kramarz和Margolis（1999）提出的“AKM模型”要求时，我提供了该模型对工人换雇主时工资变化所施加限制的图论解释，并检验了这些限制在基准数据集中的满足程度。本文给出了赋予这些工资变化因果解释的假设，并讨论了在将其汇总为全球企业工资水平排名时出现的一些困难。在回顾方差分解的计量经济学时，我认为注意力应集中在效应大小而非方差份额上，因为后者在不同噪声水平的数据集之间难以比较。本文回顾了用于解决有限流动性偏差的交叉拟合和聚类方法。一系列边界设定和插补练习表明，通常与交叉拟合方法结合使用的网络修剪对感兴趣的估计量影响很小。对最新国际证据的回顾发现，在欠发达国家，偏差校正后的企业效应标准差往往显著升高。本文回顾了企业效应对协变量进行第二步回归的方差估计方法，并通过一个关于企业规模工资溢价的实证应用加以说明。最后，我讨论了AKM模型与著名的Postel-Vinay和Robin（2002a）序贯拍卖框架之间的联系，并总结了这一交叉领域未来工作的一些方向。

33083.title: The Long-Run Impacts of Regulated Price Cuts: Evidence from Medicare
33083.zh_title: 管制性降价的长期影响：来自医疗保险的证据
33083.abstract: We investigate the effects of substantial Medicare price reductions in the medical device industry, which amounted to a 61% decrease over 10 years for certain device types. Analyzing over 20 years of administrative and proprietary data, we find these price cuts led to a 25% decline in new product introductions and a 75% decrease in patent filings, indicating significant reductions in innovation activity. Manufacturers decreased market entry and increased outsourcing to foreign producers, associated with higher rates of product defects. Our calculations suggest the value of lost innovation may fully offset the direct cost savings from the price cuts. We propose that better-targeted pricing reforms could mitigate these negative effects. These findings underscore the need to balance cost containment with incentives for innovation and quality in policy design.
33083.zh_abstract: 我们研究了医疗保险在医疗器械行业大幅降价的影响，某些器械类型的价格在10年内下降了61%。通过分析超过20年的行政和专有数据，我们发现这些降价导致新产品推出减少25%，专利申请减少75%，表明创新活动显著减少。制造商减少了市场进入，并增加了对外国生产商的业务外包，这与更高的产品缺陷率相关。我们的计算表明，创新损失的价值可能完全抵消降价带来的直接成本节约。我们提出，更有针对性的定价改革可以减轻这些负面影响。这些发现强调了在政策设计中平衡成本控制与创新和质量激励的必要性。

33082.title: Firm-to-Firm Referrals
33082.authors: Jing Cai, Wei Lin, Adam Szeidl
33082.abstract: We make randomized firm-to-firm referrals between 700 supplier and client firms in the industry producing the Chinese writing brush. Subsidized referrals lead to subsequent transactions and a partial crowding out of prior partners; information-only referrals have no effect. The referrals increase revenue, profit, and hours worked in supplier firms and growth-oriented client firms. Treated suppliers increase product quality, while treated clients expand product variety into higher-quality products, suggesting that the referrals enable complementary upgrading. Treated firms increase beliefs about the value of partners, search for partners, and the number of non-referred partners, suggesting that pessimistic beliefs is a key partnering friction. The referrals generate very large private and social returns.
33082.zh_abstract: 我们在生产中国毛笔的行业中，对700家供应商和客户企业进行了随机化的企业间推荐。有补贴的推荐导致了后续交易，并部分挤出了之前的合作伙伴；仅提供信息的推荐则没有效果。这些推荐增加了供应商企业和以增长为导向的客户企业的收入、利润和工作时间。受处理的供应商提高了产品质量，而受处理的客户则将产品种类扩展到更高质量的产品，这表明推荐促进了互补性的升级。受处理的企业增加了对合作伙伴价值的信念、对合作伙伴的搜索以及非推荐合作伙伴的数量，这表明悲观信念是一个关键的合作伙伴关系摩擦。这些推荐产生了非常大的私人和社会回报。

33081.title: Firm Climate Investment: A Glass Half-Full
33081.authors: Prachi Srivastava, Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites, Ivan Yotzov
33081.abstract: We analyse the importance of climate-related investment using a large economy-wide survey of UK firms. Over half of firms expect climate change to have a positive impact on their investment in the medium term, with around a quarter expecting a large impact of over 10%. Around two-thirds of these investments are expected to be in addition to normal capital expenditure, with some firms investing less elsewhere. These investments will be driven by larger firms as well as those in more energy-intensive sectors. Climate investments are expected mainly in switching to green energy sources and improving energy efficiency, and firms expect to finance these mainly using internal cash reserves. Overall, although firms are expecting to invest more resources in adapting to climate change, under reasonable assumptions, these investments are still not sufficient to meet the estimated targets implied by the UK Net Zero Pathway.
33081.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项覆盖英国各行业的大型企业调查，分析了气候相关投资的重要性。超过一半的企业预计气候变化将在中期内对其投资产生积极影响，约四分之一的企业预计影响较大，超过10%。这些投资中约三分之二预计将超出正常资本支出，部分企业则在其他方面减少投资。这些投资将由大型企业以及能源密集型行业的企业推动。气候投资预计主要集中在转向绿色能源和提高能源效率方面，企业预计主要利用内部现金储备为这些投资提供资金。总体而言，尽管企业预计将投入更多资源来适应气候变化，但在合理假设下，这些投资仍不足以达到英国净零排放路径所暗示的估计目标。

33080.title: Tyranny of the Personal Network: The Limits of Arm’s Length Fundraising in Venture Capital
33080.zh_title: 个人网络的暴政：风险投资中保持距离募资的局限
33080.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, Dean Parker, Ting Xu
33080.abstract: Growing retail participation in private markets causes private fundraising to shift from relationship-based to arm’s length. Focusing on venture capital funds, we study a 2013 policy—the 506(c) exemption—permitting public advertising in private markets. 506(c) funds have more retail investors and managers with weaker networks, yet do not underperform. Advertising reduces search costs and enables more catering to investor preferences. Nonetheless, 506(c) take-up is limited because arm’s length fundraising depends on hard information, but few managers establish a track record without developing a strong network. Institutional investors also consider 506(c) a negative signal because they avoid co-investing with retail.
33080.zh_abstract: 私人市场中零售投资者参与度的增长，导致私人募资从基于关系型转向保持距离型。聚焦于风险投资基金，我们研究了2013年的一项政策——506(c)豁免——该政策允许在私人市场进行公开广告。506(c)基金拥有更多零售投资者和网络较弱的经理人，但并未表现不佳。广告降低了搜索成本，并使得更多迎合投资者偏好成为可能。尽管如此，506(c)的采用率有限，因为保持距离的募资依赖于硬信息，但很少有经理人能在不建立强大网络的情况下建立业绩记录。机构投资者也将506(c)视为负面信号，因为他们避免与零售投资者共同投资。
33080.meta: Programs：CF, LE, PR；JEL：G21, G23, G32, J15, J16

33079.title: Rethinking Short-Term Real Interest Rates and Term Spreads Using Very Long-Run Data
33079.zh_title: 利用超长期数据重新审视短期实际利率与期限利差
33079.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Barbara Rossi, Paul Schmelzing
33079.abstract: Utilizing critical recent data advances, we analyze empirical evidence on long-run samples of short-maturity real interest rates as well as term spreads based on multi-century data. In contrast to an extensive literature on short-maturity real interest rates over the past few decades, we find strong and consistent evidence of trend stationarity in long horizon series, relatively fast adjustment speeds, and a paucity of structural breaks – results that we show to survive out of sample tests. The use of very long-run data offers a fresh perspective for ongoing monetary policy debates surrounding r*, and also provides a crucial missing link to reconstructing the long-run properties of term spreads. On balance and against limited post-COVID data, our evidence suggests caution on the idea of a break in short-term real interest rate behavior and instead points to elements of continuity over very long time periods. Relatedly, we show that term spreads are secularly rising while inflation volatility trends in the exact opposite direction – a finding questioning the emphasis of influential term structure models.
33079.zh_abstract: 借助近期关键的数据进展，我们基于跨越数个世纪的样本，分析了短期实际利率以及期限利差的长期实证证据。与过去几十年来关于短期实际利率的大量文献相反，我们发现了长期序列中趋势平稳性、相对较快的调整速度以及结构性断裂匮乏的强有力且一致的证据——我们证明这些结果在样本外检验中依然成立。利用超长期数据为围绕r*的持续货币政策辩论提供了新视角，也为重构期限利差的长期特性提供了关键缺失的一环。总体而言，面对有限的疫情后数据，我们的证据表明，对于短期实际利率行为出现断裂的观点应持谨慎态度，反而指向了超长时间跨度内的连续性要素。与此相关，我们展示了期限利差在长期内呈上升趋势，而通胀波动性趋势则完全相反——这一发现对具有影响力的期限结构模型的侧重点提出了质疑。

33078.title: The Distaste for Housing Density
33078.abstract: We characterize the distribution of suburban homeowners’ preferences for housing unit density. To measure welfare changes under counterfactual increases in density, we first construct a novel house-level measure of exposure to density and identify its price effects in a boundary discontinuity design. On the borders of municipalities with larger minimum lot sizes, lots are 3,000 ft² larger and houses are $\$40,000$ costlier. We exploit the systematic variation in density exposure induced by these discontinuities to estimate price effects. We then connect these estimates to a structural hedonic model of housing choice to retrieve individuals’ preferences for density. Overall, we find an average welfare loss among incumbent homeowners from a 1/2 unit per acre increase in density (which is equivalent to a 0.3 standard deviation in density) of about $\$9,500,$ with significantly larger losses under counterfactual increases solely from rental units. There is other noteworthy heterogeneity in these preferences, too. Most households have only a moderate preference over density. The median welfare loss is only 55% of the average, implying a long, left tail of those with more extreme aversions to density. This tail disproportionately contains households in affluent, low density neighborhoods. In sum, our results document an important foundation of the demand for density regulation across U.S. suburbs that we hope serves as a valuable input into future research into the considerable costs of that policy.
33078.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了郊区房主对住房单元密度偏好的分布。为了衡量在反事实密度增加下的福利变化，我们首先构建了一种新颖的房屋层面密度暴露度量，并在边界断点设计中识别其价格效应。在最低地块面积要求较大的城市边界上，地块面积大3000平方英尺，房屋价格贵40000美元。我们利用这些断点引起的密度暴露系统性变化来估计价格效应。然后，我们将这些估计值与住房选择的结构性特征模型联系起来，以获取个人对密度的偏好。总体而言，我们发现现有房主因每英亩增加0.5个单元（相当于密度增加0.3个标准差）而平均福利损失约9500美元，而在仅由租赁单元引起的反事实增加下，损失显著更大。这些偏好也存在其他值得注意的异质性。大多数家庭对密度只有中等程度的偏好。中位福利损失仅为平均值的55%，这意味着存在一个对密度有更极端厌恶的长左尾。这个尾部不成比例地包含了富裕、低密度社区的家庭。总之，我们的结果记录了美国郊区密度管制需求的一个重要基础，我们希望这能为未来研究该政策的巨大成本提供有价值的输入。

33077.title: Ridesharing and Substance Use Disorder Treatment
33077.zh_title: 网约车与物质使用障碍治疗
33077.authors: Conor Lennon, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Keith F. Teltser
33077.abstract: We examine whether ridesharing provides a meaningful transportation alternative for those who require ongoing healthcare. Specifically, we combine variation in UberX entry across the U.S. with the Treatment Episode Data Set to estimate the effect of ridesharing on admissions to substance use disorder treatment. People needing such treatment report transportation as a barrier to receiving care. We find that UberX entry into a Core Based Statistical Area has no effect on the overall number of treatment admissions. However, we find a decline in non-intensive outpatient treatment which is fully offset by an increase in intensive outpatient treatment. Given the required relative frequency of non-intensive and intensive outpatient treatment in terms of visits per week, our findings indicate that UberX helps to reduce transportation barriers to accessing healthcare. Event-studies show parallel trends in outcomes before UberX entry and results are robust to numerous sensitivity checks.
33077.zh_abstract: 我们考察网约车是否为需要持续医疗保健的人提供了有意义的交通替代方案。具体而言，我们将UberX在美国各地进入的差异与治疗事件数据集相结合，以估计网约车对物质使用障碍治疗入院人数的影响。需要此类治疗的人报告称交通是接受护理的障碍。我们发现，UberX进入一个核心基于统计区域对总体治疗入院人数没有影响。然而，我们发现非强化门诊治疗有所下降，这完全被强化门诊治疗的增加所抵消。考虑到非强化和强化门诊治疗在每周就诊次数方面的相对频率要求，我们的发现表明UberX有助于减少获取医疗保健的交通障碍。事件研究显示，在UberX进入之前，结果变量呈现平行趋势，并且结果对众多敏感性检验是稳健的。

33076.title: AI and Finance
33076.abstract: We provide evidence that the development and adoption of Generative AI is driving a significant technological shift for firms and for financial research. We review the literature on the impact of ChatGPT on firm value and provide directions for future research investigating the impact of this major technology shock. Finally, we review and describe innovations in research methods linked to improvements in AI tools, along with their applications. We offer a practical introduction to available tools and advice for researchers interested in using these tools.
33076.zh_abstract: 我们提供证据表明，生成式人工智能的开发和采用正在推动企业和金融研究的重大技术变革。我们回顾了关于ChatGPT对企业价值影响的文献，并为未来研究这一重大技术冲击的影响提供了方向。最后，我们回顾并描述了与人工智能工具改进相关的研究方法创新及其应用。我们为有兴趣使用这些工具的研究人员提供了可用工具的实用介绍和建议。

33075.title: Nonbinary and Transgender Identities and Earnings: Evidence from a National Census
33075.zh_title: 非二元和跨性别身份与收入：来自全国人口普查的证据
33075.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Donn L. Feir, Krishna Pendakur, Casey Warman
33075.abstract: We provide the first evidence from a large population Census on earnings disparities experienced by nonbinary people—those who do not exclusively identify as men or women—and transgender people—those whose gender differs from their sex assigned at birth, relative to cisgender people. Using restricted-access 2021 Canadian Census data linked to tax records, we find that nonbinary individuals assigned male at birth, transgender men, transgender women, and cisgender women all earn significantly less than comparable cisgender men. Nonbinary individuals assigned female at birth experience an additional earnings penalty. Differences in job sorting explain a large share of these disparities.
33075.zh_abstract: 我们首次提供了来自大规模人口普查的证据，关于非二元性别者（那些不纯粹认同为男性或女性的人）和跨性别者（那些性别与出生时指定性别不同的人）相对于顺性别者所经历的收入差距。利用与税务记录相关联的2021年加拿大人口普查受限访问数据，我们发现，出生时被指定为男性的非二元性别者、跨性别男性、跨性别女性和顺性别女性的收入均显著低于可比的顺性别男性。出生时被指定为女性的非二元性别者经历了额外的收入惩罚。工作分类差异解释了这些差距的很大一部分。

33074.title: Targeting the Gender Placement Gap: Marks versus Money
33074.zh_title: 瞄准性别录取差距：分数补贴与金钱奖励
33074.authors: Pelin Akyol, Kala Krishna, Sergey Lychagin
33074.abstract: Using data from the Turkish University Entrance Exam, we investigate the extent of the gender gap in college placement, its underlying causes, and potential policy interventions. We estimate preferences using a novel approach which improves our ability to capture substitution patterns and find clear evidence that placement differences are primarily driven by preference differences across gender. We compare stipend subsidies to score bonuses that achieve gender parity. Score subsidies improve the welfare of women almost entirely at the cost of men with similar scores and favor high-income women. Stipend subsidies improve the welfare of women, but at little cost to men and favor low-income women. Our work is the first to show that how gender neutrality is achieved matters to society.
33074.zh_abstract: 利用土耳其大学入学考试的数据，我们调查了大学录取中性别差距的程度、其根本原因以及潜在的政策干预措施。我们使用一种新颖的方法来估计偏好，该方法提高了我们捕捉替代模式的能力，并发现明确证据表明录取差异主要由性别间的偏好差异驱动。我们比较了实现性别平等的助学金补贴与分数奖励。分数补贴几乎完全以牺牲分数相近的男性为代价来提高女性的福利，并有利于高收入女性。助学金补贴提高了女性的福利，但对男性的成本很小，并有利于低收入女性。我们的工作是首次表明实现性别中性的方式对社会至关重要。

33073.title: Are Community College Students Increasingly Choosing High-Paying Fields of Study? Evidence from Massachusetts
33073.zh_title: 社区大学学生是否越来越多地选择高薪专业？来自马萨诸塞州的证据
33073.authors: Richard J. Murnane, John B. Willett, Aubrey McDonough, John P. Papay, Ann Mantil
33073.abstract: The labor-market payoff to workers with associate degrees in healthcare and STEM occupations is very high in Massachusetts. We examine whether this induced a growing proportion of students in MA community colleges (MACCs) to earn an associate degree (AD) in one of these fields. We do this by using multinomial logit analysis to compare trends across 12 cohorts of MACC entrants in the proportion of students who earned an AD in a healthcare or STEM program within six years of entry.
33073.zh_abstract: 在马萨诸塞州，拥有医疗保健和STEM职业副学士学位的工人的劳动力市场回报非常高。我们考察这是否导致马萨诸塞州社区大学中越来越多的学生选择在这些领域获得副学士学位。为此，我们使用多项逻辑回归分析，比较了12个马萨诸塞州社区大学入学队列中，在入学六年内获得医疗保健或STEM项目副学士学位的学生比例趋势。

33072.title: The Health and Employment Effects of Employer Vaccination Mandates
33072.zh_title: 雇主疫苗接种强制令的健康与就业效应
33072.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Ian Larkin, Brian McGarry, Katherine Wen, Huizi Yu, Sarah Berry, Vincent Mor, Maggie Syme, Elizabeth White
33072.abstract: Health care facilities considering mandating staff vaccination face a difficult tradeoff. While additional vaccination coverage will directly reduce disease transmission within the facility, the imposition of a mandate may also cause vaccine-hesitant staff to quit, which could harm patient care. To study this tradeoff, we leverage comprehensive administrative data covering virtually all US nursing homes, including payroll-based records on approximately 500 million daily nurse shifts and weekly data on COVID transmission and mortality at each facility. We use a difference-in-differences framework to estimate the impact of employer-imposed vaccine mandates at 581 nursing homes on disease spread, employment outcomes, and several patient care metrics. While mandates did slightly increase staff turnover, the effects were concentrated on staff working less than 20 hours per week, and resulted in a reduction of less than two minutes per patient-day. Furthermore, there is only limited evidence of lower levels of care at mandate facilities in typically-monitored conditions such as patient falls, pressure ulcers, or urinary tract infections. In contrast, implementing a vaccine mandate led to large increases in staff vaccinations at mandate facilities, which directly led to less transmission of and lower patient mortality from COVID. We estimate that vaccine mandates saved one patient life for every two facilities that enacted a mandate, a large effect given the typical facility has around 100 beds. Our results suggest that the health benefits of mandates far outweigh the costs in terms of reduced patient care from staff turnover.
33072.zh_abstract: 考虑强制要求员工接种疫苗的医疗机构面临艰难的权衡。虽然额外的疫苗接种覆盖率将直接减少机构内的疾病传播，但强制令的实施也可能导致对疫苗犹豫的员工辞职，这可能损害患者护理。为了研究这种权衡，我们利用了覆盖几乎所有美国养老院的综合行政数据，包括基于工资单的约5亿个每日护士班次记录以及每个机构每周的新冠病毒传播和死亡率数据。我们使用双重差分框架来估计581家养老院雇主实施的疫苗强制令对疾病传播、就业结果和多项患者护理指标的影响。虽然强制令确实略微增加了员工流动率，但影响集中在每周工作少于20小时的员工，并导致每位患者每天护理时间减少不到两分钟。此外，在通常监测的条件下，如患者跌倒、压疮或尿路感染，强制令机构的护理水平下降证据有限。相比之下，实施疫苗强制令导致强制令机构的员工疫苗接种率大幅提高，这直接减少了新冠病毒的传播并降低了患者死亡率。我们估计，每两家实施强制令的机构就能挽救一名患者的生命，考虑到典型机构约有100张床位，这是一个很大的效果。我们的结果表明，强制令的健康益处远远超过因员工流动导致患者护理减少的成本。
33072.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：I1, I10, I12, I18, J2, J28, J30

33071.title: Perceived Political Bias of the Federal Reserve
33071.zh_title: 美联储的政治偏见感知
33071.authors: Pei Kuang, Michael Weber, Shihan Xie
33071.abstract: We conduct a survey experiment with a large, politically representative sample of U.S. consumers (5,205 participants) to study how perceptions of the U.S. Federal Reserve’s (Fed) political stance shape macroeconomic expectations and trust in the Fed. The public is divided on the Fed’s political leaning: most Republican-leaning consumers believe the Fed favors Democrats, whereas most Democrat-leaning consumers perceive the Fed as favoring Republicans. Consumers who perceive the Fed as aligned with their political affiliations tend to (1) have a more positive outlook on current and future economic conditions and express higher trust in the institution, (2) show greater willingness to pay for and are more likely to receive Fed communications, and (3) assign significantly more weight to Fed communications when updating their inflation expectations. Strong in-group favoritism generally amplifies these effects. Finally, if Trump were elected U.S. president, consumers would overwhelmingly view the Fed as favoring Republicans. The proportion of consumers viewing the Fed as an in-group would remain stable, but its composition would shift: Democrat-leaning consumers would see the Fed as less of an in-group, whereas more Republican-leaning consumers would perceive it in this way. Likewise, overall public trust in the Fed would remain steady, but trust among Democrat-leaning consumers would decline significantly, whereas it would rise among Republican-leaning consumers.
33071.zh_abstract: 我们针对一个大型、具有政治代表性的美国消费者样本（5205名参与者）开展了一项调查实验，研究公众对美联储政治立场的感知如何影响宏观经济预期和对美联储的信任。公众对美联储的政治倾向存在分歧：大多数倾向共和党的消费者认为美联储偏向民主党，而大多数倾向民主党的消费者则认为美联储偏向共和党。那些认为美联储与自己政治立场一致的消费者倾向于：（1）对当前和未来经济状况持更乐观态度，并对该机构表现出更高的信任度；（2）更愿意为美联储的沟通付费，也更有可能接收这些沟通；（3）在更新通胀预期时，会赋予美联储沟通信息显著更高的权重。强烈的内群体偏袒通常会放大这些效应。最后，如果特朗普当选美国总统，消费者将普遍认为美联储偏向共和党。认为美联储属于内群体的消费者比例将保持稳定，但其构成会发生变化：倾向民主党的消费者会认为美联储更不属于内群体，而更多倾向共和党的消费者则会持相反看法。同样，公众对美联储的整体信任度将保持稳定，但倾向民主党的消费者中的信任度将显著下降，而倾向共和党的消费者中的信任度则会上升。
33071.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D72, D83, D84, E31, E7

33099.title: The GDPR and SDK Usage In Android Mobile Apps
33099.zh_title: 《通用数据保护条例》与安卓移动应用中的软件开发工具包使用
33099.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Ziqiao Liu, Liad Wagman
33099.abstract: Using data on Software Development Kits (SDKs), we study SDKs in Android apps vis-à-vis the adoption of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) by the European Union in May 2018. Relative to US-only apps, the number of non-Google SDKs used per app in 5 major European countries (EU5) exhibits a 1.3% decline in EU5-only apps after GDPR, and a 6.3% decline in apps multihoming US and EU5. These effects are mostly driven by lower-ranked apps. Using apps’ monthly active users as weights in computing average user exposure to SDKs in app category and country groups, we find no significant change in the average SDK exposure in EU5-only relative to US-only apps. The only significant change in multihoming apps is a 4.2% drop in exposure to SDKs developed by minor SDK providers, although SDKs from Google and major SDK providers were independently assessed as riskier than those from minor SDK providers.
33099.zh_abstract: 利用软件开发工具包（SDK）的数据，我们研究了安卓应用中的SDK使用情况与欧盟于2018年5月采纳《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）之间的关系。相对于仅在美国上线的应用，在GDPR之后，仅在欧盟五国（EU5）上线的应用中每个应用使用的非谷歌SDK数量下降了1.3%，而在美国和欧盟五国同时上线的应用中则下降了6.3%。这些效应主要由排名较低的应用驱动。以应用的月活跃用户为权重，计算应用类别和国家组中用户对SDK的平均暴露程度，我们发现，相对于仅在美国上线的应用，仅在欧盟五国上线的应用中用户对SDK的平均暴露程度没有显著变化。在同时上线的应用中，唯一显著的变化是用户对小型SDK提供商开发的SDK的暴露程度下降了4.2%，尽管来自谷歌和主要SDK提供商的SDK被独立评估为比来自小型SDK提供商的SDK风险更高。

33098.title: The China Shock Revisited: Job Reallocation and Industry Switching in U.S. Labor Markets
33098.zh_title: 再探中国冲击：美国劳动力市场中的就业再配置与行业转换
33098.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Kyle Handley, André Kurmann, Philip A. Luck
33098.abstract: Using confidential administrative data from the U.S. Census Bureau we revisit how the rise in Chinese import penetration has reshaped U.S. local labor markets. Local labor markets more exposed to the China shock experienced larger reallocation from manufacturing to services jobs. Most of this reallocation occurred within firms that simultaneously contracted manufacturing operations while expanding employment in services. Notably, about 40% of the manufacturing job loss effect is due to continuing establishments switching their primary activity from manufacturing to trade-related services such as research, management, and wholesale. The effects of Chinese import penetration vary by local labor market characteristics. In areas with high human capital, including much of the West Coast and large cities, job reallocation from manufacturing to services has been substantial. In areas with low human capital and a high initial manufacturing share, including much of the Midwest and the South, we find limited job reallocation. We estimate this differential response to the China shock accounts for half of the 1997-2007 job growth gap between these regions.
33098.zh_abstract: 利用美国人口普查局的机密行政数据，我们重新审视了中国进口渗透率上升如何重塑美国地方劳动力市场。受中国冲击影响更大的地方劳动力市场经历了从制造业岗位向服务业岗位更大的再配置。这种再配置大部分发生在同时收缩制造业运营并扩大服务业就业的企业内部。值得注意的是，约40%的制造业岗位损失效应是由于持续经营的企业将其主要活动从制造业转向贸易相关服务业（如研究、管理和批发）所致。中国进口渗透率的影响因地方劳动力市场特征而异。在人力资本高的地区，包括西海岸大部分地区和大城市，从制造业到服务业的就业再配置规模巨大。在人力资本低且初始制造业份额高的地区，包括中西部和南部大部分地区，我们发现就业再配置有限。我们估计，对中国冲击的这种差异化反应解释了1997年至2007年间这些地区之间就业增长差距的一半。

33097.title: Everyone Steps Back? The Widespread Retraction of Crowd-Funding Support for Minority Creators when Migration Fear is High
33097.zh_title: 人人退后？当移民恐惧高涨时，众筹对少数族裔创作者的支持普遍撤回
33097.authors: John (Jianqiu) Bai, William R. Kerr, Chi Wan, Alptug Y. Yorulmaz
33097.abstract: We study funding gaps on Kickstarter across multiple ethnic groups from 2009-2021. Scaling the concept of racially salient events, we quantify the close co-movement of minority funding gaps in crowd-funding to inflamed political rhetoric surrounding migration. The funding gap for minorities more than doubles in the most inflamed periods compared to baseline. Results are especially acute for Hispanic creators. Distant, mostly white backers are typically important for projects reaching a critical threshold of funding support. Retractions in support for minority creators during tense periods are even spatially, as present in liberal cities as conservative ones.
33097.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2009年至2021年间Kickstarter上多个族裔群体的资金缺口。通过扩展种族显著事件的概念，我们量化了少数族裔在众筹中的资金缺口与围绕移民的激烈政治言论之间的紧密联动关系。与基线相比，在政治言论最激烈的时期，少数族裔的资金缺口增加了一倍以上。对于西班牙裔创作者而言，结果尤为严重。通常，来自远方、主要是白人的支持者对于项目达到关键资金支持门槛至关重要。在紧张时期，对少数族裔创作者的支持撤回在空间上也是普遍的，在自由派城市和保守派城市中同样存在。
33097.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：D26, G23, J15, L26, M13

33096.title: Willingness-To-Pay vs Administrative Hurdles: Understanding Barriers to Social Insurance Enrollment in Thailand
33096.zh_title: 支付意愿与行政障碍：理解泰国社会保险参保的障碍
33096.authors: Benjamin A. Olken, Rema Hanna, Phitawat Poonpolkul, Nada Wasi
33096.abstract: Many government social insurance policies have low take-up. To understand whether this is due to administrative barriers, information, or low valuation of the insurance, we study an unusual policy experiment in Thailand that offered a very large lump-sum incentive for informal workers in selected provinces to enroll in a voluntary workers' social insurance program. Using administrative data, we find that the temporary enrollment incentive increased coverage by 67 percentage points—from 6 percent of informal workers to 73 percent -- within just a few months. However, 12 months later, only 13 percent of these new enrollees remained in the scheme, much lower than the retention rate of those who joined absent the incentive. By using new enrollees' choices among insurance tiers to back out a revealed valuation of insurance, we find that those who were induced to enroll by the incentives value insurance less than those who enrolled without. Combined, the results suggest that low social insurance enrollment may be the result of low ex-ante valuations of the insurance, rather than administrative barriers.
33096.zh_abstract: 许多政府社会保险政策的参保率较低。为了理解这是由于行政障碍、信息问题还是对保险的低估值，我们研究了泰国一项不寻常的政策实验，该实验为选定省份的非正规工人提供一笔非常大的一次性激励，以鼓励他们加入自愿性的工人社会保险计划。利用行政数据，我们发现，临时参保激励在短短几个月内将覆盖率提高了67个百分点——从非正规工人的6%提高到73%。然而，12个月后，这些新参保者中只有13%仍留在该计划中，远低于没有激励而加入者的留存率。通过利用新参保者在保险层级间的选择来反推其揭示的保险估值，我们发现，那些因激励而参保的人对保险的估值低于那些没有激励而参保的人。综合来看，结果表明，社会保险参保率低可能是由于事前对保险的估值低，而非行政障碍。

33056.title: Revisiting Stock Market Signals as a Lens for Patent Valuation
33056.zh_title: 重新审视股票市场信号作为专利估值的视角
33056.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Elia Ferracuti, Jay Prakash Nagar
33056.abstract: Estimating the private value of patents is important, yet challenging. By developing a method based on stock market returns to produce estimates of individual patent values, Kogan, Papanikolaou, Seru, and Stoffman (2017) (KPSS) opened venues for new research. We characterize the measurement error in KPSS – the difference between the true patent value and the corresponding KPSS estimate – and show it is negatively correlated with the true patent value. We then investigate the use of KPSS estimates in two different applications. First, we show that using KPSS values to gauge differences in value between different patent groups is internally inconsistent and introduces attenuation bias. We offer two solutions: extending the original KPSS method to allow for patents to be drawn from two distinct value distributions, and using abnormal stock market returns. We compare both to the original KPSS estimates in several contexts relevant to the organizational scholars, such as patents by large and small teams, scientific and non-scientific patents, and offshored and domestically invented patents. Second, we show that KPSS yield unbiased estimates when used as explanatory variables. These analyses allow us to characterize the main trade-offs associated with each approach, and offer practical guidance to researchers.
33056.zh_abstract: 估算专利的私人价值很重要，但也具有挑战性。Kogan、Papanikolaou、Seru和Stoffman（2017）（KPSS）通过开发一种基于股票市场回报的方法来估算单个专利价值，为新的研究开辟了途径。我们刻画了KPSS中的测量误差——真实专利价值与相应KPSS估计值之间的差异——并表明它与真实专利价值呈负相关。然后，我们研究了KPSS估计值在两种不同应用中的使用。首先，我们表明，使用KPSS值来衡量不同专利组之间的价值差异在内部是不一致的，并引入了衰减偏差。我们提供了两种解决方案：扩展原始的KPSS方法以允许专利来自两个不同的价值分布，以及使用异常股票市场回报。我们在与组织学者相关的几个背景下比较了这两种方法与原始KPSS估计值，例如大型和小型团队的专利、科学和非科学专利、离岸和国内发明的专利。其次，我们表明，当KPSS用作解释变量时，它们会产生无偏估计。这些分析使我们能够刻画每种方法的主要权衡，并为研究人员提供实用指导。
